title: Hades
description:
They say gut feelings are your guardian angels, Ella Thomas will soon find out that hers was leading her to something she could never imagine existed. 

Hades has watched over Ella since the day she was born, he was her guardian angel from the depths of the underworld. For centuries he's waited, waited for someone to love. 

He vowed to himself to protect Ella and only watch from afar. She was so innocent and so human, he couldn't take that away from her. 

For 20 years he kept his promise, for 20 long and grueling years he watched from afar, until something happens, something that Hades can't ignore. He makes a hasty decision and leaves the underworld, heading to Earth where he knows she will be. 

But there's a catch, the very person, or should I say God, that Hades despises the most will stop at nothing to destroy his happiness, even if it means killing someone so harmless and oh so very fragile. 

.......

"How do I look?" He muttered, stepping out of the bathroom. The room seemed increasingly smaller with his large stature in it.

I nearly gasped, why did he have to look so good in those grey sweats? 

I swallowed, trying to act unaffected by his beauty, "Convincingly human."

.......

title: The Comeback
description:
*past*

"Just leave Mary Grace." Teddy says to me with a blank stare, but I could see sadness built around them.

"But Teddy, why-" I begin to say as a tear falls down my cheek.

"No one wants you here loser. Ted never liked you. He just felt sorry for you." Savannah Oak says beside Teddy.

I look to Teddy knowing that he'll stick up for me like he always does, but he is just staring at the floor.

"Is that true?" I ask looking at him.

He looks up and nods.

"Dont you have a flight to catch?" Paige asks with a smirk.

Tears Fall  down my face, Savannah rolls her eyes and walks away.

"Goodbye Mary Grace." Teddy says closing the door.

I slowly turn around and hop back on my bike.

How could he do this to me? We've been friends since we were little.

He turned out to be just like the rest of them. He never did like me.

I ride my bike  home sobbing.

"Mary Grace what happened?" My sister Anna Maria says running over to me. As I push my bike onto the driveway.

"I  never want to comeback here again!" I cry into  her shoulder.

***

Summary will be the first chapter!

Hope you enjoy, first Teen Fiction Story. :)

Btw. This is my story I made it up with my mere imagination, so don't steal thanks.

title: Too Young To Be Old
description:
**Synopsis:**

Kim's morning starts like any other-dogs barking, the sun spilling through her window, and the quiet hum of an ordinary day. But as she drags herself out of bed, something feels off. Her parents are gone. Their bedroom is empty, and all that's left is a cryptic note and an ATM card on the kitchen table.

The truth hits like a ton of bricks: she's alone. But Kim isn't just dealing with the absence of her parents. She's facing a bizarre new reality. 

Kim's world has fractured in two. By day, she's Kira Knight, a 26-year-old personal assistant to an arrogant boss, living a life built on a web of lies and a fake identity. By night, she's 17 again-back to being the tomboy who can't seem to escape the messy chaos of her life. 

With three kids to care for, a double life teetering on the edge of collapse, and a romance that could ruin everything, Kim is forced to juggle a web of secrets, lies, and hidden desires. Can she hold it all together before everything she's worked for unravels, or will her two worlds collide in a disastrous crash?

*Welcome to Kim's chaotic new normal, where survival isn't just about keeping up-it's about keeping everything from falling apart.*

title: Passionate Exchange
description:
Madison is a reserved girl with a comfortable yet uneventful life back home. She has good grades, a loving sister, and a father who's intent on her living her life to the fullest. But as soon as she arrives in Portland, thousands of miles away from her safety net, she's caught off guard by Archer, her new housemate. With his intimidating brown eyes, clipped replies, and mysterious demeanour, Archer is bound to wreak a little havoc whether she wants him to or not.

He doesn't want her to pick up the pieces of his broken self as many have tried and she doesn't plan on upending her new life for a boy who won't even spare her a glance. Over time and amidst the various little white lies and destructive mistakes, they continue to hide their feelings. She wishes to protect her newfound friendships and he wishes to battle his demons alone.

He'll promise her he needs her when no one's around to hear then insist there isn't anything between them when suspicions start to raise. Faced with situations she could only dream of and challenges she thought she'd never overcome; she has to hold herself together while her world crumbles around her.

Will Madison throw caution to the wind and risk losing everything for someone who wouldn't do the same for her?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Abbie. As you can probably tell I love writing and reading. When I'm not doing that, I'm probably watching Netflix or YouTube. My ultimate favourite series is The Walking Dead because of Rick Grimes and Daryl Dixon, of course.

I'm from England but I dream of travelling the world. I have an endless list of places I want to visit but New York and South Korea are my top two.

I decided to write a book and publish it here because I wanted to try something new. I've always enjoyed reading books, so I thought why not try writing one myself? I am so glad I did because writing has become a huge passion of mine.

My top favourite authors are Taylor Jenkins Reid and Christina Lauren. Love and Other Words has a special place in my heart and I will always be invested in Macy and Elliot's relationship.

Now, onto the number one book that you must read. I don't have a favourite book I suppose you could say every book I read is my new favourite. But, if my life were on the line, I'd probably choose The Hunger Games by Suzanne Collins. Peeta and Katniss' story is superior, not to mention it's a classic.

Anyway, if you're reading this, thank you for looking at my profile and if you happen to be interested, check out my Instagram for updates and teasers on my upcoming books.

Instagram: abbiewalkerwattpad

title: Brave Love
description:
[Second book of the Baked Series] 

"For when there is Love, every ending is a new beginning". The broken-hearted meet again, but will it be in vain? Age passes a pen to two, where-for once-they will have the power to write their own tale.
One where, perhaps, a prince gets married to another prince.

A second chance? Time runs.

authorBio:
I have a dirty little secret...

I use way too much tissue. Well, you see...(rambles on and on about saving trees but then fails to). I can use up one tissue box in less than a week. Each meal I have, you will see at least four or five tissue balls beside me plate. And this is a conservative number :3 Okay why am I talking about tissue.

WARNING: Unhealthy obsession with sweet stuff like cupcakes and waffles and chocolate and honey milk and...did I mention cupcakes?
Another unhealthy obsession with cats =＾● ⋏ ●＾=
I read ALL of the comments on my books and ALL the messages in my inbox :3



Family! ✿ :
My sunshines, Papa and Ruka-san @4510471P ℒℴѵℯℒᎥѵℯ


This place, here, gives me all the happiness in the world. And I have no one else to thank but you Bakers for it.
As for my readers who read my other books and not the Baked series, the love is really not any less. I'm very glad that it's not just the popular ones that shine.
There are many people here, on Wattpad, that have made me the way I am and have helped me in my journey. But there is no way I can ever make up to them; only to press on and continue being who I am, write without regrets, and do my best. That way, I won't disappoint them.

It is very easy to be bad sometimes; to give in to the temptation of hurting others because you feel that the world is just so unfair to you. I guess true strength is when you  willingly choose not to do so; and perhaps wish them all the happiness in the world;


Even if you don't have it.




I am rather a people person. Message me, follow if you want to, I'll be happy to make new friends. ^^




Love comes with stupidity. So does bravery. And many other good things in life.

title: Because of Him
description:
[highest ranking in romance - #3]
[highest ranking in teen fiction - #19]

"You've built your walls so high no one can climb them. But I'm gonna try."

                                         ❧

          Lauren Gates is an eighteen year old girl whose past has left her with major trust issues and has caused her to shut out socializing from her life completely. But when she moves with her aunt to a new state, everything starts to change.  

          Logan Williams is popular, good-looking, and determined to help Lauren break out of the shell she's been hiding in for the past three years - no matter what it takes. 

           Somewhere along the way, her feelings for Logan start to develop into something more than she expected. But can she really learn to let go and allow herself to feel this way? Or will she keep holding on to the past?

title: Brooklyn Nights (BxB)
description:
Pierson "Pierce" Matthews is living in the city of Brooklyn where he can see the majestic view of the Brooklyn Bridge. He has a happy life, a stable job, a home where he can live, and an income that can support his family throughout their lives.

Back in High School he was being mocked at, being bullied, and he decided to prove someone that he could reach the top and never back down. Pierce is contented the way things are happening, and he thinks that nobody or nothing can drag him down. Until one thing happens that he didn't expect.

Someone from the past comes along, and worse, that person has become his new boss, who will do anything just to see him crumble down, anticipating his downfall. But would Pierce let that happen? He was basically a follower when he was a student of the Jacksonville High School, and he decides that he has had enough of that; he will do whatever it takes to  reach the top, just like he promised to his parents.

title: The Probability of Love
description:
"Maybe instead of focusing on getting girl's numbers, you should focus on getting A's."

People automatically think "nerd" when they hear the name Jade Clarke. She excels in all of her classes and is expected to be awarded as Valedictorian at the end of high school. The only guy she trusts in her life is her twin brother, Shane, who has stuck by her side through thick and thin. 

When football captain, Raysen Pierce is struggling in Trigonometry, Jade is called in to tutor him. Without the help of her, Raysen is most likely going to fail which means he can kiss all his football dreams, goodbye. 

During their tutoring sessions, secrets get revealed and she soon learns that there is more to Raysen than she expected. A side that only Jade gets to see is revealed and makes her question her opinions on boys. Raysen isn't the only one learning new things, though. Can he teach Jade to trust again? Will she finally be able to see that not all boys are the same? 

---
Highest Ranking: 
#25 in Teen Fiction (6/11/18)

title: Summer to Remember | ✓
description:
It's been five years since the sudden disappearance of Cora Cadigan's mother. Five years since the case was closed before it even began. 

In the final summer before the end of high school, Cora knows it's her last opportunity to find the answers she so desperately needs. Only her luck has never quite worked out. 

Until golden-boy, Rhys Laderman, that is. Rhys has the type of connections Cora needs in order to learn the truth. Unfortunately for her, she's despised his rich kid facade and cocky attitude from the moment he was born. 

Only, if she wants the answers, Rhys holds the key. A dangerous key that could set off a chain reaction.

Will Cora move past old town rivalries and the dangerous spark she feels with Rhys to solve the mystery that has haunted her for five years? 

It's her final summer to find the answers. A summer to remember.

Cover designed by Ria Amelia

title: Mayfly Melodies
description:
Everything was going perfect for Bailey Grant.  A life in Nashville, a hit music career, an upcoming international tour.  She thought that nothing could possibly bring her down from the high she was on.  And then everything went to shit. With all that she's ever worked towards crashing down in shambles around her, Bailey finds herself returning home to her roots.  Her passion for music lost and without a clear purpose, Bailey is unsure where she is heading next. But meeting Noah Hartley might be the exact kind kind of distraction that she's looking for.
  
A Texan bull-rider with mute sister, Noah Hartley has problems of his own.  After a freak accident destroyed his old life, he packs up and moves to Oklahoma, determined to start anew with his sister.  A new ranch, a new life, Noah is ready to embrace the future, whatever that means.   But when he collides with Bailey Grant, the only person who seems to be able to connect with his silent sister, he knows that nothing will ever be the same again.
  
Two people set on a collision course that will alter their lives forever, Mayfly Melodies showcases the innocence of love, the strength of lives torn apart, and the indescribable healing power of music.
  

 *First Place Winner of the 2017 Realist Awards: Summer Edition 'Realist of Them All' Award and a Featured Wattpad story
  
 Cover designed by the incredible: @WonderfulMiracles

title: Third In Line
description:
In 2025, Her Royal Highness Princess Eleanor approaches her twelfth birthday. After a sheltered childhood, the burden of fame and responsibility is beginning to find its home on her shoulders. Can she handle it? 

Her family of British royalty continues its mission to stay modern and relevant in a world that often seems like it is leaving them behind. It's members are looked up to as celebrities around the world, but how long will that last? 
      
Using a combination of real life members of the British Royal Family and my own original characters, this is a royal fanfiction that follows the life of Princess Eleanor, the first born daughter of the Duke and Duchess of Cambridge, as she slowly makes her way towards her royal destiny.

- Will and Kate AU, British Royal Family, set in the near future
- WATTYS LONGLIST 2018

title: Cautious  | Emmett Cullen
description:
"Where have you been all my life?"

 Since the day Emmett Cullen woke up with red eyes and an unknown thrist digging in his throat, he's been on the search to find her. Long ago, Alice saw her in a vision. The girl with wild curls and a dazzling smile.

  "She's a beauty." The immortal told him as her eyes clouded, "She's something else." 

 And when he found that day in the winter of '98, he realized she really was something else. He would get to know the turtle who hid in her shell and would only speak to those she knew she could trust. Emmett knew he needed to be safe around her because she was delicate like a flower. He had to be cautious because if she ever found out the truth of his family, things wouldn't be as calm as they were.

 Disaster would tear apart her glorious heart.


{Emmet Cullen x OC} 




Started: June 20, 2019
Ended: May 29, 2020

title: The Tutor
description:
Rafe Ferreira, the spoilt son of an Italian millionaire, is banished to a small town for his troublesome behaviour. In his final year in a new school, he has one year and one chance to prove to his father that he is not a hopeless case and is a worthy heir to a fortune. 

Nora Fujioka is a small-town girl whose head is only filled with getting good grades. Her hard, no-nonsense attitude to studying makes her a social recluse and a major geek in school. 

She also happens to be the one person who can genuinely help Rafe. 

Initially, it doesn't help that they are polar opposites. She thinks he's an ungrateful slob. He thinks she's a mean stuck-up.  But they learn more from each other than they originally bargained for.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Writing has been my hobby ever since I penned my first fanfiction for Naruto. I have always been a sucker for the cliche, corny romances, sappy endings and love-hate relationships with polar opposite characters.

Shoujo manga, J and K dramas and my relentless daydreaming heavily influence my stories. If I could draw, my books would definitely be comics. My stories tend to be about first love and innocent school romance with a dash of humour.

"Wicked is good." Her voice sounds so harsh, yet soft. Her striking blue eyes analysing my every move, blood red lips moving as she talks to the people around me. She smirks at me, porcelain white teeth showing from under her rouged lips. My vision becomes blurred, and my memory begins to fade.

Those three words echo throughout my mind as my eyes close.

I awake with a gasp - I rack my mind for answers. Simple things come to my mind, like: eating a hotdog, climbing a tree, holding someone's hand. But the face of the person, who was holding my hand, is blurred - like they were erased from existence. Why can't I remember anything?

Where am I? What is my name? Where does this thing lead me?

title: Obligated To The Dellucci
description:
Book One of Mafia Ultimatums 

As a young child Arieon Anderson was orphaned when she lost a brother and her parents in a fire that started in their home. 

Dominic Dellucci and some members of his mafia, were on a stakeout in the neighborhood on a rival gang member who was undercover as one of his men. Yeah the bad guys do stakeouts too. 

Dominic noticed the fire and was compelled to help and that's when he found Arieon, no taller than his knee the poor thing. His men urged him to leave the child behind but she struck a soft spot within him.

The Dellucci, being one of the Italian American mafias, had quite the number of rivals in this literal cut throat race. To gain power they partnered with Luca Rivera. However, the Toscani, another family, was after the Dellucci's most prized possession, Arieon. 

She was the stone that would kill two birds, and make The Toscani's grip on the world tighter. 

A decision had to be made, on an offer that couldn't be refused. The Toscani wanted Arieon Anderson in exchange for his niece.

Though the exchange was nothing in front of Luca Rivera's words, "I'm afraid we can't meet the agreement. That's my future wife. She won't go with you." Those three sentences, said in attempt to uphold peace and keep Arieon safe would shake her world and force her to uphold her responsibilities to the Dellucci. 

Although with mafia rats involved how safe was safe?

title: Odd One Out
description:
Oddball Mabel has always been quirky. Maybe it's due to the fact that she was homeschooled or perhaps it was because of her parents who sheltered her a little too much from the world. Whatever it is, she's determined to make her college years count, so when she meets popular football player, Jackson, she's convinced she's in love. In fact, she tells him this on their first encounter. 

Clearly needing all the help she can get in this department, she turns to her neighbour, who by the sound of it, gets all the action he wants. Can grieving and guarded firefighter Marcus help Mabel learn the ways of love? Or will she teach him how to live life with your heart on your sleeve?

authorBio:
I love writing sweet stories about healthy relationships, with a focus on love, friends, and family and guaranteed happy endings!

I'm not a big fan of crazy, unnecessary drama - I find life has enough of that and I want to read about uncomplicated relationships with solvable road blocks, so that's what you'll find here!

Hope you enjoy reading! Pop by and say hi - I love comments and messages and reply to everything!

title: Royally Flushed
description:
When a broken Malia meets playboy Prince Louis at boarding school, past secrets emerge and a dangerous threat against the monarchy arises, but as they grow closer will their bond survive or will it be destroyed in the plot against the reigning family?

                                                       ***


Malia Spencer jumps at the chance to get away from her evil stepfather after her mother's death and finds herself situated at a nice prep school for the exorbitantly rich and famous in England after her aunt on her mother's side rescues her from America. 

Little did she know, though, that she was among royalty. 

Enter Prince Louis: the sexy and enigmatic bad boy player of Wilmington Prep that stumbles into her life without warning, opening her mind to his sarcastic remarks and smart ass ways. She realizes that he's someone she will have to endure if it means staying in England and as far away from her step father as possible. 

But what happens when the complexities of his royal life interfere into her own, digging into her past and the tragedies that accompany it?

Will she be able to pick up the pieces of her heart or will it forever be royally flushed?

title: The Aurelian Legacy
description:
#2 in Portal (1/14/2025)

Fifteen-year-old Riley James has always been out of step with her peers. After a vampire hunts her down, she learns why. She's the daughter of two murdered witches from Aurelia, a place where every day might kill you: monsters roam the streets, high school starts at midnight, and everyday travel involves braving a spirit realm. She manages to escape the attack with a stolen object that brings her to this unknown land.

But Aurelia rejects those without powers, threatening Riley's chance to investigate her parents' murder. In a bid to stay, Riley devises a way to fake them-only to wind up as the only person at a magic school who can't do magic. Avoiding exposure is difficult, but her ruse becomes dangerous when she discovers she's been marked as a Guardian. This prominent position will not only see her trained to fight Aurelia's monsters, but will force her to work alongside werewolf Fiery Davis, the son of the man accused of killing her parents. Fiery might hate her, but for Riley, familiarity breeds something much sweeter than contempt. 

As Riley continues digging into her parents' murder, things become even messier, and she soon uncovers a web of corruption surrounding their deaths. A web that someone will-and has-killed to keep hidden, and which Riley's return to Aurelia now threatens to expose. When "accidents" start to happen, it's clear that Riley's next. Monsters are the least of her concerns when the greatest danger comes from powerful people with dark secrets who will do anything to keep them.

~*~

What to expect
- An exciting world to get lost in (especially if you love Halloween!) 
- A proactive protagonist with agency
- Diverse characters
- Action/adventure
- Plot twists galore 
- An enemies-to-lovers slow-burn romance
- Themes: found-family, identity, self-discovery, coming-of-age 
- YA content 

Perfect for fans of Harry Potter, Percy Jackson, & Netflix's Wednesday
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm in the process of publishing my first full-length novel, the Aurelian Legacy. I've been working on developing the idea for over four years, so this story is very near and dear to me. It is meant to be the first of an eight-book series. At a minimum, I will upload a new chapter every week.

When I'm not writing, I'm usually found binge-watching Buffy reruns or crossing off spots from my travel bucket list (most recently, Nicaragua and Antarctica). As you may have already guessed from my story, I adore the spooky season.

Note: I will not do V4V's. But I will do R4R's when stories are of mutual interest. I will gladly offer constructive feedback on the books of others during R4Rs if they request it and offer the same courtesy on mine.

In which a naive girl is hired to be the maid of billionaire, Donovan Johnson. But little did she know he wanted her to be more than just that. And all it took was one sinful night for both of their lives to change.

"Let go of me," I said, frighten at his sudden mood change.

"You're mine," He growled.

"I belong to no one," I replied, defiantly when his eyes darkened as his jaws clenched.

"If you say that one more time, not only will I punish you but make you regret ever working for me," He smirked.

"You wouldn't," I gasped.

"Try me," He said, darkly as he harshly pulled me to his chest.

title: Count The Stars
description:
Elijah Rosen, an introverted seventeen year old with a love for football, sneaks out almost every night to get away from the problems he faces during the day. He feels like his anxiety is taking over his life, and the only place he can go to escape it is the pitch black night right outside his window where he can be alone and let his thoughts run wild.

But after he finds Adam Chang sitting at the bottom of an empty pool in the early hours of the morning with puffy red eyes and bruised hands, he begins to find comfort in something other than the dark.

Only, Adam has a few problems of his own. 

And with pressure coming from his family, his friends, his school, and his own mind, Elijah isn't sure how he'll make it through the year.

-------

"I think if you weren't here, I wouldn't be okay. I'd..." I trailed off, not wanting to say the words that we both knew were true.

"Hey," he said softly, "I'm just glad I'm here, then."

He started to let go of me, but I wrapped my arms around his neck and hugged him like I never had anybody else before.

"I'm glad you are too."

title: Luna Queen
description:
I hadn't always dreamed of a man to sweep me off my feet and propose underneath the twinkling moonlit stars.

Yet, I hadn't ever dreamed of a god in form of a man to knock me off my feet and practically reject me, a few days after being accused and punished for causing my parents' brutal murder.

But, I had always expected one thing.

A man, a god, a being of an extraterrestrial manner incorrigible to the mere mortals scattered around this wicked world we call ours.

I had expected him.

He is the King of all Alphas. The one who rules above all forms of authority.

His snarl alone was enough to send a grown man to his feet, his eyes alone enough to twist anyone into fear of no other experienced before.

He was a monster.

I, his mate.

He was heartless.

But, so was I.

-

© Luna Queen (2015)
Victoria Leslie Khan

title: The Players Baby
description:
November Smith --   the girl that everyone knows. The same one that every guy wants to take out on a date.     Micheal Kingston --   king of the school, and all of the ladies in it. So, when Micheal's parents want him to be more responsible and mature, they start a search for his perfect wife who will set him straight and tell him right from wrong. title: Shadow Weaver (Back on Wattpad 2020!)
description:
"Mooooorrrrrrrreeeeeeee, this book is like air, i need it!"  @noromance101 

"These chapters are written BEAUTIFULLY! You are, without a doubt, my favorite writer on this site. " @nagykt 

"Reading this feeds my soul."  @Yrthraethra

Sixteen-year-old Mirra can see people's memories. She is a Shadow Weaver, one of the outlawed, glitter-eyed race feared in her land and forced into brutal slavery as children. She and her brother Kel have escaped their fate by hiding near the frozen mountains. But when bounty hunters snatch Kel, Mirra injured and unable to track long distances will lose him unless she gives herself up to his captors. As as a Shadow Weaver who's survived childhood and whose golden-flecked irises have faded, concealing her talent, Mirra's own value is priceless on the black-market.

Taken to a lawless town in the northern territories, Mirra convinces her captors to sell her to a mysterious young man destined for the same province as the officer who has bought her brother. The young man is the Kingdom's missing Prince, feared dead after his escort was attacked on an expedition. He has been in hiding, waiting for a Shadow Weaver whose skill he can use to discover who ordered his assassination. But before he will risk breaking his father's law and taking Mirra to the royal court, he must test her talent and her ability to hide it. If Mirra fails, her hopes of seeing her brother again will be cut by the noose around her neck.

HIGHEST RANKING #1 in Fantasy on Wattpad. #1 Amazon Sword & Sorcery

This book was taken down in DEC 2017 due to publishing restrictions. It is now possible to put it back up on wattpad. From March onwards 2 chapters will be posted per week until the completed book is available.

title: Social Menace [boyxboy]
description:
Nolan Fletcher isn't bothered by his new school. He doesn't mind the uniforms, the bullies, or the requirement that he join a club. He is, however, a little bothered when he finds out the Social Action Club he's joined is just a cover for a revenge business. Run by the mischievous Tyson Strazio, the members include athletic twins, a sweet faced con artist, and a chihuahua loving tech genius. Together, the group handles the rampant bullying problem- for the right price. Locked into their risky schemes, Nolan has to help them pull off their plans while evading capture by the police and the school. As a group of their angry victims starts to form to hunt them down, the Social Action Club is tasked with their biggest challenge yet: Saving their own asses.

title: Living with Hope ✓ [ boyxboy ] [ Completed ]
description:
The Wildcats and Falcons have an irrefutable rivalry that's never been questioned. Alexander "Lex" Hope is the  captain of the Falcons basketball team. And Ivan Petrov, the star player of the Wildcats. They're the spearheads of their town's basketball rivalry, causing havoc every time they butt heads.  

After his homophobic father kicks him out for being gay, closeted Ivan Petrov has no choice but to move in with his biggest rival, Lex Hope. What he first believes to be a temporary arrangement becomes his permanent residence. And the self-obsessed playboy Lex Hope seems... kinder (and harder to resist) than Ivan expects. 

Despite his local stardom, life isn't easy for Ivan. He has enough to deal with : an alcoholic father, a dying mother, and now: sharing a room with his nemesis. Overwhelmed, all Ivan can now do is live with hope. Quite literally.

Suddenly, Ivan not only has to worry about Lex winning the Wildcats-Falcons match, but also Ivan's trust and - most importantly - his heart. 

Maybe that line between love and hate isn't so thick after all.

title: Candyfloss
description:
"Cora." He called, eyes caressing my face in a way that I so badly wanted for his fingers to instead. "Tell me to stop."

I gulped, the words frozen on the tip of my tongue.

"Cora, tell me now." He repeated, growing more agitated as his gaze moved down to my mouth.

"I can't." I said honestly, shoulders 
dropping in defeat.

That was the only confirmation he needed before he crashed his lips to mine.

***

The story of a girl who's been putting up a wall for as long as she can remember, and a boy who will stop at nothing until he brings it down.

Left behind in the care of Loretta, her staged grandmother, Amelia grapples with abandonment and the shattered pieces of her identity.
 As she navigates the ache of being forgotten, Amelia discovers unexpected strength within herself and finds solace in the unconditional love of Loretta.

title: Just Don't Ask {Damijon!}
description:

Its been a few years since the Supersons first teamed up, the unlikely partnership turned friendship between the Boy of Steel and the Son of the Bat.

At first neither Damian nor Jon could stand the other, it was an uneasy partnership based on nothing more than the will of their fathers and their duty as superheroes. 

Yet as time went on the pair developed a sense of camaraderie, a mutual respect for one another, then eventually.. a bond, a special bond, one not so easily broken... a bond Jon feels is best-friendship.. but Damian.. well on Damian's end.. it feels like its something.. different.. something he's not quite sure he's ready to admit.

title: Jack of Clubs (BxB)
description:
•Book one of the Suit Series. Can be read as a stand-alone•

They were always rivals. 
There wasn't a person who didn't know all about Sam and Sawyer's animosity. It may seem like such a cliché love story between the loyal football player who loved to be the center of attention, and the sarcastic, reserved boy with little to no friends. 

Could it be more perfect? 

Well it all changed on a fateful Friday night. Sawyer just wanted to cheer up his best friend at the local diner. But when Sam and his friends entered the parking lot, everything fell apart. The world as they knew it changed forever, and the two rivals were forced to confront one horrifying truth:

They were both being stalked by the same men.

title: Classroom of the Elite : All I Want
description:
Freedom, freedom, freedom.

Ayanokouji Kiyotaka, a Masterpiece of the White Room. The fifteen years old teenager chose to try to escape from the fate that his father had written for him.

He entered Advanced Nurturing High School thanks to the advice of one of his father's workers, Matsuo. He has only one determination, to seek as much freedom as possible in the three years he will attend school. At least, he could feel what freedom is before returning to the White Room.

Unfortunately, due to his desire for freedom, Ayanokouji Kiyotaka questioned his intention to return.

Was he really just looking for three years of freedom?

Was he sure he wanted to go back to the White Room?

Amidst many doubts, Ayanokouji Kiyotaka once again asked for something crucial.

What does hope actually mean?

title: It Doesn't Even Matter
description:
Max is struggling, plain and simple. After dropping out of school two years ago to help his mom with the bills and losing his best friend, he's just kind of shut things out. His life has been in pure survival mode. Work, pay bills, survive. But things only getting more complicated when he's ripped away from everything he's ever known. His mom, never the most put together woman has an affair with her married boss and gets pregnant. Now she's decided to move them both to Beverly Hills and into his place! With new step siblings that hate him before they've even met and a man that thinks he can just jump in and be his father, Max has had just about enough of everything. On top of all that he's starting up school again, and with these new fancy rich kids, Max feels even more suffocated and out of place then he did before. Will Max figure out his place or fall farther and farther into the background suffocating?

title: It's Not What It Looks Like
description:
In which the popular boy attempts to use an exchange student to make his ex girlfriend jealous, but his ex ends up (fake) dating the exchange student instead.

-

After nearly three years of breaking and making up with her ex-boyfriend, all that Silena Valentine wants is some peace and quiet. Instead, she gets Mena Skelin- a handful of a temporary roommate, whose otherwise extensive vocabulary doesn't seem to include either of those words. Soon enough, Silena finds herself volunteering to do things she never would have even imagined: like kissing someone in front of the entire school, and catching very real feelings for her very fake girlfriend. 

And the latter kind of sucks, since she's pretty certain that Mena is only doing this in order to get revenge at the boy she actually likes.

But then again, everything isn't always what it looks like.

title: Tiger's Mate
description:
When a young werewolf finds himself unable to explain why he feels so much hate for the new mysterious classmate, curiosity and claws get the better of him and soon secrets that neither of them thought to have seen coming are revealed - along with a flood of questions, unexplainable feelings, and dangerous truths.

* * * 

Cold hearted werewolf Ethan Drayre was unrivalled with his cold intimidating personality and reputation for being one of the most dangerous guys in school. He never backed down from a challenge and never lost a fight. Almost everyone in the school knew not to mess with him.

Almost.

Because when new student - and rising talk of the school - Katski Black shows up one day, seemingly out of nowhere, there's an undeniably challenging aura about him that Ethan can't ignore. And quickly enough, a mutual feud is formed between the two of them that quickly brings problems on both sides.

But why does Ethan have a feeling there's more to Katski than he lets on? 

And what happens when discovering Katski's secret ends up dragging Ethan into more trouble than either or them ever bargained for?

It seems tigers and wolves aren't the only thing on the hunt...

[Temp. Title > still trying to think of something more creative ;D]

* * *

A/N
Includes: Werewolf/action/romance/humour/adventure/fiction/lgbtq/and swearing < blame Ethan (mostly)

This is more so just a story to vent fluff + plot XD

title: The Good Girl Boxer
description:
COMPLETED BUT EDITING 

~~~~🌸~~~~

"Look who joined us boys. If it isn't the GG herself." I rolled my eyes and taped my hands as one of the annoying jocks sauntered my way. 
    
"What are you doing here GG? Book club is in the other hallway." I heard his little group laugh and I stood up once I was done taping my hands.
     
Standing at my full height I was only up to his nose, but I didn't care, "You know maybe if your egotistical head wasn't shoved so far up your butt, maybe you could actually make some friends who like you." 
     
I turned on my heel and walked to an open mat when the jock who I had just insulted, grabbed my shoulder and turned me to face him, "You can not speak to me like that you Good Girl." 
     
I was getting so tired of the nick name, "Then fight me and see how much of a 'Good Girl' I really am." 

~~~~🌸~~~~

When Daytona Lyn literally runs into Logan Wylde, things kind of start to go down hill from there. She gets threatened, deceived, and it all takes a toll on her for the worst. Someone even makes it their personal goal to see her suffer to the point of no return. 

Between the lies, deception, hurt, and everything else that could possibly go wrong in her life, will Logan be able to save her, or will she be too far gone?

title: The Other Side
description:
Every summer the girls rent out an airbnb that allows two other people to rent the other half.

Everytime they stay the girls wait to see who rents it out. It's always a random couple, either on their honeymoon, a trip, or two old ladies having a little get away.

Their favorite thing about staying at the Beach Haven, is you never know who stays on the other side.

Every summer they hope it's someone different, two other girls, two other guys. They never know, but that's all a part of the fun.

This year, they didn't expect two attractive boys to be seated in the kitchen.

Two very attractive boys.

Once they all make eye contact, they must get to know each other. It's only right since they'll be here for two and a half months.

Cheers to the beginning of an amazing summer! Right?

Welcome to a summer full of lies, love and jealousy.

title: The Bad Boys and The Tomboy (COMPLETED)
description:
Alice Avery lives in a society where every girl must wear mini skirts and unbelievably high heels. Where girls are expected to be bimbos and guys are Greek Gods. So how does a tomboy fit in this situation? And where are the bad boys? 

Alice Avery is a tomboy. She loves to skateboard and hates gossip. She hates skirts, dresses, make up, and drama. She speaks up for herself and has not seen people due to being homeschooled all of her life. How will she take it when her senior year is spent in a public school filled with bimbos, jocks, and bad boys? What if she ends up living next to the bad boys? Oh jeez....

Now, for the bad boys. The Three Musketeers are the baddest boys in school. But no girls there are good enough to be their girlfriends. No matter how slutty they're willing to be. But Alice is different.

The Three Musketeers are more dangerous than many people know but the people they work for are even worse. What happens when Alice gets mixed up in their crazy mess? 

Secrets will be revealed. Love will be in the air. Guns will be fired. Lives will be lost.

(This book is currently being edited. There are many mistakes.)

title: Stuck In An All Boys Camp
description:
I, Skylar was accidentally sent to a Hot Boys Camp I mean ALL BOYS CAMP . At first I hated it but then I met the boys in my Cabin. 

They were the sexiest and attractive people I've ever met.  Which made me wanna stay longer..... Oh if I had signal on my phone which I don't because this camp is in the middle of friggin no where I'd probably tweet about this. 


Anyways I started to grow really close to one of my cabin mates Caden. He's very flirty,hot,cute......and has a great personality (sometimes). He's the best thing that has ever happened to me in a long time. I am well boy crazy for him. It may sound like I'm obsessed with him but I'm not. I swear. 

I've never liked anyone this much in my life. So I plan to be the nicest/cutest girl to him. The other boys tell me that "Caden is hard to get" and hasn't dated anyone in a while. 

But I definitely think that will change this summer.

title: Through his lens
description:
*completed


Navigating your way through an American high school is hard enough without adding an accent into the mix.

British girl Evie seemingly had the perfect life. That was until the car accident that left her an orphan and only child. 
Her parents friends offer to take her in but that would mean moving to California, going to high school and making new friends.

It's not all bad though. Especially as Harrison the most irritating, good looking guy she's ever met and the rest of the soccer team insist on bombarding their way into her life.

They say when one door closes another one opens. What people forget to mention though, is that most of the time you'll be violently shoved through the new door with barely a moment to breath.

title: His Guilty Pleasure (FIRST DRAFT)
description:
Gabrielle Hampton has always been a little heavier than her peers--a fact that no one seems to let her forget. Leo Hamilton in particular--having gone as far to coin the nickname "Flabby Gabby." After a steamy summer fling, the dynamic between the two shifts--or so Gabby thinks. 

In school, the two are rivals, but in private Leo can't deny his attraction to Gabby. When a new love interest demands Gabby's attention, Leo is forced to make a choice. His reputation and everything he has worked so hard for...or the girl that he's not supposed to love?

A story about the VERY REAL stigma behind loving a "fat girl."
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
My MO: I write about characters of all sizes. I've been fat and I've been skinny so I can relate to both. We need more body diversity in books!!! That's what I'm trying to spread--your character doesn't need to be a size zero to be interesting!

My Style: I like first person and present tense but I like to challenge myself sometimes!

My Pet Peeve: Please don't give me hate. Constructive criticism is welcome, but you give me hate and there will be a problem. These are my stories to tell, and if you don't like them then bye!!!

title: The Bet
description:
Who could ever think that because of a football game you could find true love? Well Jason Parker wouldn't. He is the schools hottie, captain of the soccer team, and a big player. From your perspective it looks like he has an awesome life. He gets to have any girl he wants, whenever he wants. Basically he's the leader.

In reality his life isn't like everyone else's. He has tried to keep his school life and personal life  separate from each other. He hasn't had any problems with anyone getting involved. 

Until his friends challenged him to take Alyson's virginity since Jason has already taken every single girls virginity in his school. Just not quite all the girls. 

Alyson Lopez is our typical straight A student. Hasn't let anyone get in her way.  She is a very independent girl.

Although towards Jason she is the complete opposite. She has had a crush on Jason since 7th grade. She knows that he breaks hearts with every step he makes. She tries to avoid him in every single way. That is until he notices her. The more closer she gets to him the closer she is to find out who he is and what he does...

title: 𝗕𝗥𝗢𝗞𝗘𝗡 𝗕𝗢𝗡𝗗𝗦 - 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗔𝗥𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗥
description:
In a world where population control is a ruthless mandate, The Archers are the government's most lethal weapon. Taken as newborns and stripped of all emotion, these girls are trained to be cold, calculating assassins, each a master of death. Among them are the top-ranked Archers: Lucy Jane Valentine, Dawn Blake, Mia Wayland, and Katherine Fowler-each known for their unmatched skills and merciless efficiency.

When the four are sent to the seemingly insignificant town of Beverly Falls, their mission seems routine: execute the town and spare one. But this mission is different. The one they must spare is Maia Diaz, the daughter of their founder, Victor Diaz, and a woman as dangerous as any Archer. With orders to blend in and gain Maia's trust, the girls face their toughest challenge yet-not just in the battlefield, but within themselves.

As secrets unravel and alliances shift, the Archers must confront the very emotions they were trained to suppress. In a deadly game of deception and survival, will they remain loyal to their cause, or will the cracks in their armor lead them to a new path?

The Archers is a gripping dystopian thriller about control, identity, and the power of choice in a world that demands obedience.

title: I  Accidentally Stole The Bad Boy's First Kiss | ✓
description:
#1 in Jealousy

BONUS CHAPTERS POSTED AS A NEW BOOK❤️

"I don't get it!" I yell while hurrying to catch up with him.

"You don't need to get it!" he hisses out, not sounding tired after jogging for 20 minutes straight. While I on the other hand am heaving for my breath.

"Why are you so hell bent on finding out who kissed you at Trevor's stupid party?!" 

No response. 

"It was just a kiss!" I try again. He stops up abruptly, turning around in a swift motion glowering down at me. I gulp.

"Just a kiss?!" he whispers, I nod my head hesitantly.

"JUST A KISS?!" I shrink back. He inches closer, his heavenly built towering over me. 
Forehead to forehead, nose to nose...disappointingly not mouth to mouth...  I lick my lips slowly. 

He looks down, gulping before slightly moving away.

"Just a kiss." I confirm. His blazing eyes find mine again.

"No, it was not just a kiss! Maybe for her, but not for me!" 

"Why not?!" I press on.

"BECAUSE SHE STOLE MY FIRST KISS!!" I gasp loudly, staggering back. 

His fingers graze his lips slowly before he snaps out of it, turns around and storms away.

This time I don't bother following him, I am in shock. 

I Accidentally Stole The Bad Boy's First Kiss... 

•••

Completed | ✓
Unedited (Read at your own risk)

title: My Bad Boy
description:
************
 I opened my locker but realized something was wrong the minute I looked inside it. Something like paint splashed in my face and on my clothes.

I heard laughter behind me and instantly turned around to see those five Moran's heading towards me.

"Now, no one disrespects me okay? I went easy on you, since it was your first day, but don't mess with me again. Alright love" Zack said with his signature smirk.

I saw red at this point.

I moved towards Zack and the others keeping contact with Zack the entire time. I stopped inches away from Zack.

My furiously sparkling eyes met with his amused one. And then I did the one thing I wanted to do so badly.

I slapped him.



*************************

When 17 year old Ashley Ross has to move to a new country with her mom and sister, she has no idea what awaits her. 

She just wants to keep her head down and finish her senior year.

Her plans change when she runs into the hottest and badass boy, Zack Walker.

She has to try not to fall for the annoyingly handsome Zack and his also hot best friend Josh. She needs to find a way to survive her senior year.

  There is more to this teen love story. There are twists, mysteries, secrets and more. Don't be fooled by the title because it might not be her bad boy after all.

Parties, high school drama, fights, kisses, cat fights, betrayal, secrets and more.

  The good girl always falls for the bad boy. The bad part is that the bad boy might break your heart. OR it could be the other way around.

Be inspired by their story.

title: Ruby's Heart
description:
Ruby Webb was always a good girl - until she wasn't. All it took was one steamy encounter with the boy of her dreams to screw it all up.      
   
- 
During Ruby's freshman year of high school, her strict conservative mother catches her making out on her parents' bed with the boy of her dreams. She panics and ships Ruby off to boarding school. A year later, Ruby returns to her hometown and her mother enrolls her in another brand-new private school: Bluebell Preparatory. Ruby expects nothing good or exciting about being the new girl again considering boarding school was a bust.                            
    
Terrified of ever getting involved with a boy again, Ruby returns home with a locked heart. But when she begins at Bluebell Preparatory, she finds herself torn between three boys: Nate, Asa, and Carson.                       

Nate is everything her mother would disapprove of. He's cool, handsome and bad. He gives Ruby everything and nothing, yet somehow she still finds herself drawn to him. Meanwhile, Asa is the picture-perfect football player. Before she can decide between the two, Carson Zimmerman -  the boy from her past, reappears and is determined to get Ruby back in his life at any cost.                  

How did she go from having zero guys interested in her to having three of them? And the bigger question: Which boy will finally unlock Ruby's heart?       


New chapters every week!

Roots from the trees go deep within the soil of the earth.
Roots within us grow deep within our soul, linking us to our family, our hopes, our dreams.. Our roots lead us to our start.. they lead us to our heart.

Sterling King is a girl with deep roots, and long branches that lead to nothing.

Harry Styles is a boy with bright leaves, and ever growing colors.

EXCERPT:

"Hi."

"Um... hi."

"What's your name?"

"Sterling...."

"Well... Aren't you going to ask me what mine is?"

"No...Why would I do that?"

"Because I'm a stranger peaking over the fence... I thought you'd be curious."

"Well I'm a stranger sitting in a tree house... I stopped being curious a long time ago. Curiosity brings nothing but trouble."

"Well I'm Harry... and I'm curious about you Sterling..."

"Well... stop."

title: The dog that turned wolf
description:
This story is about a dog who was abused and ran away, she found her way into a wolf pack where the Alpha of the pack took interest in her. All she wanted was a family and someone to love her, and thankfully the Alpha and his pack found it in their heart to love her the way that she deserved. 


"Are you going to ignore me the whole way back?" Night asked walking silently behind me, funny how the tables have turned. "You'd have to try to talk to me in order for me to ignore you" I say matter of factly. I heard a small scoff come from behind me. What the hell was his problem? He's the one that was ignoring me and now that I'm not trying to talk to him, I'm ignoring him? I stopped in my tracks and turned around. Night had to roughly stop so he wouldn't run into me. "Talk" I say curling my tail around my legs, he just blinked at me "about?" He asked.  I glared at him "you wanted to talk, let's talk" he didn't say anything. What the hell? Now all of a sudden he doesn't want to talk? 
I stood back up and started walking back, a Sigh was heard behind me but i kept walking. There was no point in trying to strike a conversation with night. Neither one of us knew what to say, and honestly I enjoyed the silence. It gave me time to think about everything. 






Follow the dog who was later named Alaska through her story. 
Will she be happy? 
Will Charlie her human leave her alone? 
Is she safe? 
Find out...

title: Being Bad
description:
| COMPLETE |

[this is the first draft of my story. so, if there's grammatical mistakes and continuity errors, i apologize and i will be editing in the future.]

Lia James was living in a nightmare. It all started one night, when her mother was in a car accident, and never survived the night. 

She spent the remainder of the summer in mourning. She never ate, or left her bedroom for that matter. When her Dad started to notice the new habits, he suddenly became worried and requests she lives with her two best friends for her senior year across the country. Hesitantly, she accepts. 

Senior year was supposed to be the best year of her life. She made the Varsity Softball team, and she made tons and tons of new friends. That is, until she comes across Andrew Price: Local bad boy with a well-known reputation, and a heavy bank account. 

From leather jackets, to secrets, to new relationships, Lia finally comes to terms that her senior year will never be normal. Especially when her best friends and Andrew have a very public hatred towards each other. 

Will she manage to stay above the drama? Or will she fall into the crossfire of her best friend's feud?

title: Fall For Me
description:
Completed - 
He had me pinned against the wall outside of his dorm late at night. He was staring down at me angrily. I was confused to say the least.
 "Are you okay, Jackson?"
 "No," He shook his head. "Pissed." I was about to ask why but then he continued. "I'm supposed to be a player, Jaycee." He groaned. "But here you are, fucking making me fall for you."   
What had I done to make him fall for me?  Then he smashed his lips onto mine.  

~•~
Jaycee was smart, she accepted that. She wasn't the prettiest (in her own eyes) but she accepted that. She was quiet and sweet, she accepted that. What she didn't accept? Someone to be disrespectful toward her.  
Jackson isn't very intelligent, he accepted that. He was gorgeous, he definitely accepted that. He was loud and obnoxious, he accepted that. What he didn't accept? Someone to reject him.  
When these two cross paths, it's like Mother Nature was asking for love, hate, loss, betrayal, etc.
•••
reached #5 on Teen Fiction May 4th 2015
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hi, I'm Emily. I come from a small town in Michigan that if I said the name to, no one would even know where it is, so I'll just say I don't live too far from Detroit. Ever since career day in the 2nd grade, writing has been something I wanted to pursue a career in. I've written several stories since then, of all genres. Writing has been a way for me to express my emotions without having to be so straightforward in a sense. Writing is an art, without a doubt, and the only form of art I am good at. Over the years, I've noticed in myself that I've had trouble writing when I'm happy, which one would find very weird, I know I did. I'm proud to say that I've grown past that, and ever since I learned how to write from happiness, my work has improved.

A little disclaimer, if you ever need anything...homework help, writing tips, or just a nice pep talk to maybe improve your mood, I'm here to talk. You all matter, you all mean something to me and several other people.

I hope you enjoy my stories. I'm always looking for constructive criticism (meaning criticism that points out mistakes and makes a suggestion for improvement, not just critiquing the flaws). I try to educate myself on everything I plan to write about before I do so, but sometimes things I say may be off.

Thank you for your support, Emily Ann

title: The Bad Boy was Staring at Me
description:
17 year old, Elena Hawkins thought she was going to be done with boys forever. What Nate Thompson did to her in the fifth grade was unacceptable. She didn't want to deal with heartbreak ever again.  Without Nate in the picture anymore, her normal teenage life was going really well. She had straight A's, two incredible best friends, and wonderful parents. 

Her happy normal teenage life was all going to change. Forced to get along with the popular people, in their all too famous hang out spot. She meets Tyler Black along the way, and her whole world flips upside down. With his innuendo jokes, good looks, gorgeous black hair, and bad boy smirk, Elena can't seem to stay away. 

She learns that there's more to Tyler than everyone thinks. A side that she's only seen of him is shown. The school's bad boy isn't all that bad after all. 

Will Tyler fall for her? Will feelings be reciprocated? Or will he break her heart just like Nate did? 

~*~

"That's the first time he's called me by my first name. He usually calls me Cutie. I don't think I've ever liked the sound of my name so much, until now. He made it sound better. He makes it better."  ~Elena Hawkins

"Do I make her nervous? I don't want that. I want her to be herself around me. Show me who she really is, not what everyone else sees. I wanna see the real Elena Hawkins. And that is my mission." ~Tyler Black

title: BLEEDING SILVER
description:
Two superior races rule the land of Tellus:

Helios, the children of the sun. Born with the blood of gold. Distinct for wearing their vibrant white long-sleeved garments as they meticulously walk in groups under the broad daylight. Governed with religious beliefs, they find nobility in group decorum. 

Lunox, the children of the moon. Born with the blood of silver. Unnoticeable for their dark fitted attires as they roam the dark corners of the city in the solitude of the night. Dominated by their own personal beliefs, they show outstanding physical aptitudes that surpass any other race only when necessary.

And of course, the inferior race, humans. Born with red blood flowing under their skins.

"There must only be one clan feared by all. And that will be us." 

Then it all started-the cruel purge of the silver bloods.

Pools of silver liquid flooded the streets of Tellus under the extreme sunlight.

And only those of the five infants were saved-one baby girl so-hidden by a Helios couple and raised as one of their own.

But fate had better plans for her on the night she turns 18.

"Mother," a voice silently whispers through her ears. "My children will call you that as we stain the night with gold."

title: Living With My Bully
description:
(Original Version, New Version in Progress that I suggest waiting for if you'd like) 
"I'm sorry for your loss." I hear and look over to see Oliver, "I've been in a similar situation, I may not have lost someone this way, but I definitely did lose someone. My family and I will be here for you and will help you get through this." He says biting his lip. 

I smile a bit. "Thank you Oliver, hearing you say that really means a lot to me." I tell him. 

I can barely see Oliver look back through my tear-filled eyes but then I feel two arms wrap around me. 

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Meet Iris Mitchell, she's known as the nerd in school with her best friend, Kayla. Iris is also extremely stubborn and doesn't know when to shut her mouth. She also likes to watch Netflix 25/8 with Kayla. But in school, Iris is bullied by Addison Meyer and the one and only, Oliver Sullivan. 

Meet Oliver Sullivan, he's known as the bad boy in school but also the bully of many students in the school, and Iris is one of them. All the girls want him, except Iris and Kayla, they fantasize about famous actors and fictional characters. Oliver is mostly found hanging out with his friends Adam, Lucas, and Ross. But outside of school, Oliver is an extremely different person and no one knows. 

Well until Iris moves in with him, of course. Iris' father, Christopher Mitchell, dies in a fire, at his job, saving people on the top floors. With no mother or relatives to go live with, Iris needs to move in with a family, and her dad knew the Sullivan family pretty well. 

What's going to happen when Iris moves in with her bully? Read to find out!

title: My 5 Overprotective Brothers
description:
Braylon Ryder is 15 years old and lives the perfect life. Beautiful, athletic, smart, good grades and lots of friends.
  
  Or so everyone thinks.

What people don't know is that her parents died a couple years back in a plane crash when she was 8. 

 That she is broken and scarred. That she is afraid. That she is hurt. 
 
   But she has to deal with her 5 older brothers who are really overprotective and always on her back. 
 
  They always ask about her personal life, her social life and her love life. 
 
   Even though they are protective, they love to embarrass her.
 
   But what happens when a long forgotten friend returns for more... revenge? 

   Can Braylon turn the tables and protect her friends and her brothers from this "friend" instead of them protecting her?

~*~*~*~*~*~*~*~

Read on to see how Braylon deals with this unwanted person and tries to protect what's left of her family.

~*~*~*~*~*~*~

My first book guys! I hope you enjoy!

title: Things I Could Never Tell You
description:
Some things stay as they are, but others? They fall apart. 
And once upon a time, Stephanie Olsen and Tyler Scott were the best of friends. Once inseparable, now drifting apart. The more they grew separate, the more Stephanie's feelings for him increased and she wished she could tell him. 
But couldn't. As she watched his cheery life unfold before her. 
When she overhears the news about Tyler loosing his phone, she decides to confess her unheard feelings through texting his old lost phone, knowing he will never read those texts that lasted for a little less than one year. 
301 messages for 301 days.
But what Stephanie didn't know, is that Tyler found his phone and the 301 unread texts consisted in everything she could never tell him.

Soffee Luna is a very friendly, Super pretty academic achiever,may pag ka Childish,Clingy, Honest and magaling mag advice pag dating sa love but she doesn't have a Boyfriend since birth she have a lot of Boy Friends and Girl Friends and she's the One and Only single sa Circle of Friends nila Kasi nga in denial at shini-ship Siya sa Isang Guy na very handsome,Tall, sporty,not so academic achiever but super galing sa Math, and so Friendly 
        Maging Sila ba kaya o Hanggang MU lang? that's the question but Hindi pa nag sisimula ang Story a develish girl Gelliza Therese  Hyun came.... she's the rival of Soffee Naiam Zin Luna
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Fighter girl
description:
I'm a fighter, I fight for the the things I want, I fight for the little family I have, I fight for everything I believe in, but most of all I fight for myself. I fight on the streets where it's not safe, I fight there because I feel free and I can do what I want there. I live for the streets. 

The only problem is I can't be myself all the time, at school I can't be the scary girl that beats up men for fun, no I have to be a low life, a loner, I can't have friends not that I want them. I just can't look like me, I can't act like me, I just can't be me but I know it's for the best. 

My name is Blake Ellie Smith, I may seem like a harmless school girl but that's just my disguise, a straight A student with no friends. 

Mason Hunter, schools bad boy and full of secrets, secrets he hasn't told anyone. Including the secret of him being a street fighter, one of the best. He made a discussion to wear a disguise at the rings instead of at school. He was the bad boy at school and he didn't want to change that. 

What happens when the two best fighters cross paths. It might not end very well. 

lightly edited.

I'm terrible at descriptions, please have a look at my book. Thanks
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The nerdy fanboy (Jikook)
description:
Jungkook, the genius outcast student and science club president suddenly finds himself in the middle of everyone's attention when world star singer Jimin returns to school and becomes a member of his club. Until now Jungkook has only been a secret fanboy jamming to Jimin's song in his room, but them meeting and sparks flying might destroy everything in Jungkook's life - his nerd status, his friendships, his top grades and even his family relationships.

title: Significance (Completed)
description:
From NEW YORK TIMES and USA TODAY Bestselling author Shelly Crane comes a true love story.

Maggie is a seventeen-year-old girl who's had a bad year. She was smart and on track, but her mom left, her dad is depressed, she's graduating, barely, and her boyfriend of almost three years dumped her for a college football scholarship. Lately, she thinks life is all about hanging on by a thread and is gripping tight, with everything she has. 
                                                                                                            
Then she meets Caleb. 
                                                                                                             
She saves his life and instantly knows there's something about him that's intriguing, but she's supposed to be on her way to a date with his cousin. Things change when they touch, sparks ignite. Literally. 
                                                                                            
They bond with each other and she sees their future life together flash before her eyes. She learns that not only is she his soulmate, and can feel his heartbeat in her chest, but there is a whole other world of people with gifts and abilities that she never knew existed. She herself is experiencing supernatural changes unlike anything she's ever felt before and needs the touch of his skin to survive. Now, not only has her dad come out of his depression to be a father again, and a pain as well, but Caleb's enemies know he's bonded and are after Maggie to stop them both from gaining their abilities and take her from him. 
                                                                                                                          
Can Caleb save her or will they be forced to live without each other after just finding one another?
   
"An addicting series!"
 - Abbi Glines, NYT Bestselling Author of Existence and Fallen Too Far
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm a NEW YORK TIMES & USA TODAY bestselling author from a small town in Georgia and love everything about the south. Except the heat. If I could find a place that was 65 degrees all year long, I would move there!

I'm the wife to an amazing, fantastical husband and stay-at-home mom to two boisterous and mischievous boys who keep me on my toes. I hoard paperbacks, devour sweet tea, search year-round for candy corn, and love to spend time with my family and friends, go out to eat at new restaurants, sight-see in the new areas we travel to for book signings, listen to music, and, of course, love to read, but don't have much time to these days with all the characters filling my head, begging to come out.

I've written and published 23 books to date, #24 will be coming out at the beginning of 2016 with #25, the next Significance book, closely behind it.

Before we begin, a few Random Facts about me:
- Reba Mcentire once sang in our back yard when her bus broke down and said I was a cute baby. I was in the swing so this was a few years ago. Just a few.
- I love olives. Black and green. I eat them by the jarful. When I was a kid I used to ask for olives instead of candy.
- I'm obsessed with throw pillows. They're everywhere.
- I'm also obsessed with paperbacks. I have a home library and shelves in my office and living room full of books. Not to mention the ones that won't fit that are scattered all around and stacked up in odd places. It's kind of out of control. But it's such a pretty obsession.
- I'm also obsessed with 90's and 2000's reruns. Roswell, Gilmore Girls, Friends, One Tree Hill, Seinfeld, even Saved by the Bell and California Dreams. If any of these shows come on, I could sit and watch for hours.

title: Agent 34 (Book 1)
description:
"You're forcing me to work with them and I'm telling you now that I can't do it."

"You've worked with teams before."

"Yeah, but none with a jackass in charge."

***

They're all a part of the biggest secret agency in the world and they've begun disappearing.

Agents have begun disappearing. Gone without a trace, only to show up weeks later. Dead.

Everly Kingston is the best agent the agency has, and now she's been put in charge of finding the missing agents and preventing more from vanishing as well.

She's forced to team up with another team of agents after one of their team members, Agent 34, vanishes during a mission. And she's none too happy about it. With one overbearing and controlling team leader, one agent who really can't focus, an agent with an all-around bad attitude, an agent who redefines the term bitch, another who's stuck trying to keep everyone from killing each other, and one agent that's best described as a sociopath, this mission is bound to be a disaster before it even starts.

Fortunately for Everly, she's got a handful of friends she can count on to help pull her out of this mess and keep her from killing her new teammates. But this mission just might be the toughest one she's ever had. She'll have to learn to put aside her differences with her new team as agents continue to disappear.

Because it soon becomes clear that the last target, the last agent to disappear, will be her . . . 

***2nd Trilogy in the Agent Series. Book 1***
First Trilogy does NOT have to be read to read this one.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Romeo & Juelz ✔
description:
"Your name is Romeo? Like the--"

"--Yes, like the William Shakespeare story."

~~~~~~~~

Summer nights in the late 90s, two best friends spending their days together in a rusty neighborhood somewhere in Arizona. Except, it's the summer of 2024 but-- that doesn't matter. Juelz does matter. Juelz always matters. Maybe just a little too much. Romeo and Juelz are only best friends after all.

🏆[First Place Winner 'YA Romance' PrideAwards 2024]🏆
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello, dearest reader! The name's Mayo and I write stories. Music is therapy<3 Next to writing, I also love making (and eating) food, reading webtoons, and giving kisses to my cat.

Romeo & Juelz✔; Hot summer days in Arizona☀🌵, eating strawberry popsicles underneath a willow tree and running down the abandoned roads at night. That's how best friends Romeo and Juelz spend their summer break together. But what happens when both boys slowly begin to realize their feelings for each other? 💖If you need a break from all the heartbreak and angst, this story is for you!💖⚡

He Was A Skater Boy (ongoing); There is nothing that the chaotic Robbie Blue hates more than cliches, and he vows to keep it that way. But being the new student at a fancy private school, befriending both the popular kids *and* the outcasts, and developing a crush on the school's self-proclaimed troublemaker, threatens to get in the way of that statement.
A not-so-typical twist on your typical high-school cliche!🌈⚡

title: Nameless - I
description:
(Book One) Do you ever feel as if your life has yet to begin? I've been alive for almost seventeen years now and absolutely nothing has ever happened to me. Not until I met a girl who kick-started my life. She introduced me to love, sex, scandal, excitement, and heartbreak.  For some inexplicable reason, this girl invited a forgettable girl like me to tag along on her adventures. 
  ~~~~~~~~~~~

This is a bisexual story of a "nondescript" average girl struggling to discover herself and falling in love with someone unexpected her best friend

title: Death Is My BFFLAD (Book Two Original Series)
description:
(Bfflad- Best friends for life and death)


Dear Reader,

Let's start at the beginning shall we?

I died.

Oh no, not one of these stories again where someone angelic and heroic saves the damsel in distress.

If only I was that lucky.

My heart stopped beating. My lungs stopped working, my soul began to lift away...

And then I was saved by a beautiful man with a kind heart and sparkles sprinkled around his head in a golden halo. A cunning, dazzling smile etched his angled features and his hair lay perfectly on his head like...black, sinful layers of pure cynical distrusting evil. Evil that was just waiting to onset a innocent girl as myself and allow her a short amount of time of happiness, and then finish her off when she became older. 

I'll give you a hint. The beginning of that description was slightly exaggerated.

The Angel of Death. One of the only creatures known that was capable of settling the boundaries of heaven on earth. The only creature capable of making one of the Devil's darkest deals to my loving mother; a second chance for her daughter.

This comes with consequences of course.

Everything you know about Death is wrong. Death is not natural, Death is not normal, Death is not doleful, and Death is far from mercenary.

Death blends into the shadows like coal against the most atramentous sky.

Death walks the earth with his cursed, monstrous and exotic features, his enticing voice and betraying alluring eyes.

Death deceives, scratches, and  plays with your mind, until you slowly and painfully loose your grip on reality. He'll make you believe he's a different person, that there's a sliver hope for him. Hope for you.

Death is close.

Forever and always,
Faith Williams

Confused about the Original DIMBFF and Rewrite DIMBFF versions on my profile?

title: Long Lost Family
description:
Taliah is abused by her step father, her mother has committed suicide when she was five. All Taliah has ever know since she was little is to stay out of sight and stay alive. 

As Taliah says 'The walls you build don't block people out, they keep you safe.' She was forced to grow up at a young age and she's always been in survival mode. 

Now at 15 years old her step dad gets arrested and she's placed in the care of her 5 brothers she didn't know she had.

Maybe things will get better. Or not.

Love, Hate, and Revenge. The three ingredients that make a disaster.

There is more detailed description inside, there also will include warnings of what's in the story. I hope you enjoy.

title: LAQUETA'S DAMAGES
description:
***

Scars? She wears them like hidden badges, each one a chapter of survival.
Nightmares? They replay relentlessly, but she faces them, even when sleep becomes an enemy.
Broken? Maybe. But there's a fierce light within her cracks.

Laqueta Hayes has spent years trapped in a life ruled by fear. Isolation was her shield, a prison that kept her safe from the threats he swore he'd carry out. Her quiet, unusual ways made her an outcast, earning her the dreaded label of "weirdo" in Southern Hill-a place where being different can be a curse. But when her rare, remarkable talent opens a door to the prestigious halls of Southern Hill High, she dares to hope for a fresh start.

Except her path crosses with Atlas Zion King-the golden boy everyone admires. He's charming, untouchable, and fiercely protective of his reputation. To him, 'weirdos' are a threat to everything he's worked for. But as their worlds collide, they uncover secrets and hidden wounds that neither of them expected.

What happens when two people, each with scars that won't heal, get tangled in the threads of each other's lives?
                
  ***Highest rankings***

#1 in damaged in August 2018.
#1 in changetheworld in December 2018 & August 2020.
#1 in guilty in November 2022.

title: King of Freaks ✔
description:
#28 Highest Ranking In Teen Fiction 3/31/2017

Previously known as "Eliazer King" | Not your cliché Teen Fiction story

It's funny how one flaw can bring down a person's entire status of physical attractiveness, that goes for Eliazer King who is without a doubt an attractive individual. Unfortunately, mankind doesn't think he's irresistibly gorgeous at all.

Eliazer King is an abnegation to society because of one, simple flaw. Eliazer's right eye compared to that of a demonic child- frightening and disturbing.  His right eye is as white as a pearl and that blemish is the only reason why people think of him as an oddity and embarrassment.

Being a lone wolf is something he experienced for as long as he can remember because of his given imperfection.  Poor Eliazer will never forget the day he became visually impaired; ever.

Once Eliazer meets the peculiar Bryn Atkinson, questions and revelations begin to arise. Bryn knew she was stuck to Eliazer the minute she looked at his eye; the eye of wonder. She always said "Beauty is only skin deep", but soon enough, she learns there's more meaning to Eliazer's eye of wonder.

So it's like they say, Curiosity killed a cat.

But she has nine lives. 
~
  
Eliazer (e-lie-zir)
Atkinson (at-kin-sin)

title: Sember (Forestfolk, Book 2)
description:
Little Sember stole readers' hearts in "Siena." Join her now, ten years later, as she embarks on a quest of her own to save her people, and to finally accept her true self along the way.
- - -
Sixteen and struggling is not how Sember wants to describe herself. Born with the ability to conjure fire, every day is a challenge to keep the churning blaze within her under control. After nearly incinerating her parents at the age of six, guilt and doubt plague her at every turn. 

While the village's gifted healer is away, a mysterious disease sweeps through Foresthome, and people start dying. When her parents get infected and the resident herbalist has no solutions, she takes it upon herself to track the clues and locate the source of this unnatural plague. Joined by her brother and a handsome Iceling, they must unravel the mystery and face an unexpected enemy in the shadows. If they fail, the plague will engulf the world she knows, plunging it into dark times. 

Maybe a little fire is exactly what they need.
---

Big thanks to @vexnir for illustrating this awesome cover.

authorBio:
Watty winner.
Bootcamp Mentor.
Wattpad Originals author.
Kind soul.

I write stories that make people feel good. Whether it's romance, fantasy, or science fiction, you can rest easy knowing I love happy endings.

I accept feedback for all my stories, so if you have any suggestions on how to improve something, or even if you catch a typo somewhere, I'm eager to hear about it! No read requests please, and don't post unsolicited story links on my wall. I'm a nice person, but not a billboard.

A few random facts about me:

☺ I love ice cream.

☺ I love writing more than I love ice cream.

☺ I eat gluten free when I can due to food sensitivities.

☺ I have two little dogs who worship the food I eat.

☺ Sometimes I spend too much time talking about food. Because I like food.

☺ I have a plant in my yard named Sir Wilt-a-Lot.

☺ I once pushed the wheelchair of a homeless man five blocks in the middle of blazing summer so he could get to his bus stop.

☺ I did it again a week later.

☺ Kindness. Pass it on.
