title: The Eldest and Only Daughter [Rewriting]
description:
Amara Rose Scarlett Mason, is the only daughter, with two older protective brothers, and her twin brother who is a few minutes older than her. Her twin brother and her have always been homeschooled for most of their lives, until one day. 
Her family has always been complicated. 
She has a father who doesn't want her, he sure let her know that and has mistreated her for all her life, her brothers, and mother don't know anything about it. She always had thought she was not worthy to be loved, because of her terrible father, until one day. 


---

''You will not walk away like you did this morning.'' With all my force, I'm trying to break free of his grip on my arm.

''I know who you are, Rhys Denver Scott.'' My eyes stare into his.

''Who do you think I am?''

''The one who causes problems everywhere, you don't have any emotion. And for the last, you are going with every girl in this school. Let me go now.'' The anger slowly started to bubble up in me is coming up.

title: The Wedding In Miami
description:
Highest rankings:
Exes: #1 (4th July 2020)
Bad boy: #1 (3rd July 2020)

Follow my Instagram for any updates and if you have any questions:
@nikki_k123

Emma Roberts is offered to be a bridesmaid while she attends her best friend's sister's wedding in Miami. She gets to be a bridesmaid and she's happy to do so. Plus, a free vacation? Who would say no? Well, cut to Miami and Emma wishes she did when she finds out her ex-boyfriend, Nick Heartwell, is a groomsman and the groom is his cousin. 

The one person she's been trying to avoid for months, since the breakup, to be precise. Our bride's family has a tradition. They spend three weeks with the groom's family on vacation, playing or sorts of family games, and spending time getting to know their future family. 

Three weeks.

Emma and Nick.

Stuck together. 

Maybe second chances aren't so bad.

Read to find out what happens at The Wedding In Miami.

title: CHD
description:
E's life is stripped away from him the night his mom has an overdose. Her parental rights are stripped away, and his father, George, doesn't own that tittle. 

No, it belongs to a man who only bestows E the title of affair child, and a new shattering reality.

Braydaen life was never perfect but nnak always had nnk mother, but when she becomes distance, nnak has no one in nnk life. 

A tutoring opportunity was just an opportunity to improve rapidly failing grades. Not the opportunity for dopamine and oxytocin to increase at an alarming rate.

And certainly not a opportunity for those hormones to be taken advantage of.

                   ⁕                          ⁕                                  ⁕                              ⁕                                      ⁕

Braydaen is a jock and a joke. Studying hours just to fail. Outside of studying is nnk literal job - playing sports.

E is a troublemaker. He's done every crime he can do -- except for murder.

The two are the co-captains of the football team. They can't cooperate together even at the cost of a failed season.

One day, E gives Braydaen a heart attack
 
                                         ●   


⌞for those who want a strictly human-normativity romantic relationships and characters, i advise you to go back, because this isn't that. ⌝

title: Did you see the moon that night?
description:
Ada Louise Martin struggles to keep her life in order. Of course, there is the constant struggle of trying to deliver at the top of the class. Then, her family is maybe moving to the other side of the planet. On top of this, her oldest and strongest friendship is falling apart, and she spends all her extra time to keep it glued together. 

And, as the cherry on top, is her life-long arch-rival Elliott really a bad person? Is there something more to it? 

The anthem of the overachiever: 
There's only one way to go from the top of a hill: down.

title: Mr. Write [COMPLETED]
description:
"This book is therapy!" - Abbieking86

"I want to shoot my left knee cap," Elliot said. 
"A natural response. Is it because you favor your right?" Tristan asked.
"No, not particularly," she replied. 
"So the issue is...?" 
"I found the most amazing writer." 
"Damn! I hate when that happens," Tristan said. 

Is it better to write well, or to be well known? 

Elliot McKenzie is a prolific YA writer. Having published four books by the time she left high school, she is ready to branch out. For her fifth novel, she decided to use dual point of views. Wanting the male point of view to ring true, she needs a co-author. 

In her search for a co-author, she encounters Beck Daniels, a cocky introvert with the habit of speaking his mind. After their first meeting, Beck is the last person Elliot wants to work with. That is, until she reads his writing. As they begin to write together, Beck challenges Elliot's formulaic and clichéd writing, while Elliot calls out Beck's self-sabotage and procrastination. 

Mix in a crazy family, her sister's wedding and a publishing deadline; and Elliot might discover she has more of a voice than she thought.

title: How We Were | ✔️ (Complete)
description:
[WATTYS 2016 WINNER!] [COSMOPOLITAN Featured!]

Trapped in her white trash hell, Layla Danner is failing at life. 

Her friend Peyton? Everybody thinks he's perfect, a staggeringly rich, handsome, and well-mannered story book prince. But they don't know what Layla knows. And she'll never tell. 

Jake? Jake's trouble. A down and dirty charmer, this one's got a devil-may-care attitude and a mouth to match. 

Everything goes to hell in a handbasket when he shows up to town one summer. 

Layla never meant to fall in love. All she wanted to do was finish her senior year, get the hell out of this town and never, ever look back. 

But when mysterious secrets from the boys' past refuse to stay buried, Layla must decide how far she'll go for a chance at a once in a lifetime love. 

Follow three unforgettable characters in this captivatingly melodramatic, soap-operatic, and larger-than-life tale of first loves, loyalty, intrigue and the magic of growing up. 

♦️WARNING: This writer is a hopeless romantic with a filthy mouth and a dirty mind who loves to re-work cliches. The style of the story reflects this. Also, some dark themes. ♦️

How did you get so many followers?
- I've been on Wattpad a LONG time and slowly gathered up my followers. Other people have been on WP for less time and have even more than me. I think it just takes a popular story and being interactive with your readers!
How do I get my story popular?

- It's a lot of luck. And consistent updating and having a connection with your readers. Use an attractive book cover (Canva offers templates) and edit your work! Follow the trends, sometimes it helps to start a following to write in a genre that's already popular!

title: Unbreakable Ties
description:
"With each stolen moment, I discovered a truth I couldn't deny: he was the risk I craved, the wildness I needed to feel alive."

Francesca has always been the responsible one, the good girl whose life is meticulously planned. Vincent is the quintessential bad boy, with a devil-may-care attitude that masks deeper layers beneath his tough exterior. When their worlds collide at her brother's raucous college party, Francesca finds herself inexplicably drawn to Vincent, despite knowing he represents everything she should avoid.

Vincent, on the other hand, is captivated by Francesca's innocence and the warmth she exudes, a stark contrast to the wild lifestyle he's embraced. As they navigate their attraction, sparks fly and boundaries blur. Every stolen moment together is a risk, a thrilling dance on the edge of reason. 

But when secrets from Vincent's past resurface, threatening to shatter their fragile love, Francesca must decide if she's willing to fight for their relationship against all odds.

title: Hearts Across Halls
description:
In the halls of Brookford University, Elara embarks on a journey of self-discovery amidst the whirlwind of university life. As she navigates the challenges of newfound independence, Elara finds herself entangled in a web of relationships, each one shaping her identity in unique ways.

Among the array of encounters, one stands out-the tumultuous dynamic with Cyrus, a brooding yet enigmatic figure from her halls. From initial clashes to unexpected connections, their relationship teeters on the edge of animosity and desire, fueled by undeniable chemistry.

As Elara delves deeper into the complexities of love and self-acceptance, she grapples with the conflicting emotions that accompany her entanglement with Cyrus. With each encounter, they unravel layers of themselves, confronting their fears and vulnerabilities while navigating the unpredictable twists and turns of their budding romance.

title: café of whispers
description:
The Café of Whispers revolves around the hidden magical powers of the main characters, their ties to a larger, more dangerous world, and the struggle to protect themselves from forces that seek to disrupt their lives. This conflict is layered and involves both external and internal struggles

In a quiet corner of the city, there's a café where the air hums with secrets and magic lingers in the shadows. For Liora, the café is a sanctuary-a place where her mundane life feels just a little more extraordinary. But when she discovers a latent power within herself, her world shifts, drawing her into an unseen conflict that has been brewing for centuries.

As bonds deepen and secrets unravel, Liora learns that the lines between good and evil are not as clear as they seem. Together, they must face a looming threat that could consume the magical balance of their world, all while uncovering the whispers of destiny that tie them together.

title: The Last Knights of Cambria Book 5: Deaths of the Rose
description:
Gideon is back in trouble (what else is new) and jumping forward in time 30 years to the War of the Roses. The year is 1463. The Lancasters are on the run, and the Yorks are in power. Gideon is allied with the Lancasters but at the moment the current threat is supernatural, and hunting both houses.

As usual, living people die, dying people live, Richard III is involved somehow. Fourth wall breaks galore. Found families. Everybody is probably gay, swords are described in loving detail, people are not, lovely platonic friendships, did we mention swords? Yes, you may learn something about history and feel the overwhelming urge to join the Richard III society, but that's a risk you'll have to take. 


Trigger/Content Warnings: some mild crude humor (middle school level) and some profanity. Brief mention of abusive families. Fantasy violence. Some moderate peril and frightening scenes.

title: RHD
description:
Nike is a nerd, and a jerk. A jerk that says, does, whatever is the most harmful for a reaction. 

Tristan is a player. One that makes up stories along the way with every lover of his, and with multiple people at that.

The two have hated each other since forever, always wanting to show the other who truly is the better one.

One day, a bet is made between them.     

                             ⁕          
                                                                                                  ⁕                                
                                                ⁕             
                                                                                                                                                               ⁕                                                                                      
                         ⁕

When Nike is told to tutor a supposedly community star to lift his suffering voluntary hours greatly, his life felt over.

Till he catches a glimpse of the supposedly community star dazed look at him at one of their tutoring sessions, a realization, and an idea comes to him.

Tristan is just going through his life - meticulously scheduled dates, schoolwork, religious duties, Hebrew lessons, and a suffocating family with issues piling on every day.

A foolish, and unfair bet can't fit in - but serotonin demands. 

So, it will have to, no matter what.

title: When the Ashes Fell
description:
Jude and Ashton grew up bound by loss, finding solace in each other at an orphanage where loneliness was their only companion. Ashton, warm and determined, broke through Jude's walls, forging a bond that neither time nor distance could erase. Adopted into the same town but living vastly different lives. Once childhood friends, they drifted apart as life pulled them in opposite directions. But when fate brings them together as summer camp counselors, old wounds, unresolved feelings, and unexpected Sparks resurface.

Just as Ashton thinks the summer and Jude are behind him, disaster strikes-his family, leaving them with nowhere to go. Jude's family steps in, offering them a place to stay, forcing Ashton and Jude to share the same space and confront the tension that has been simmering between them for years.

As rivalries, class divides, and long-buried emotions collide, Ashton and Jude find themselves questioning everything they thought they knew-about each other, and about themselves.

description:
"Happy New Year!!!"

It was now or never.
I pulled Alex's arm that I was still holding until he crashed into me in surprise.  I put a hand behind his head and closed the gap between us until my lips met his.
Alex's body had gone stiff with shock, but I just pulled him closer, letting go of his arm, and putting both hands at the side of his face.
Suddenly I felt a change in Alex's body and he began kissing me back.  I responded immediately, deepening the kiss, feeling my whole body let go knowing I had done it.  I was kissing Alex. 

The day Jay made the decision to kiss his best friend seemed no different to any other.  But that one kiss had consequences that neither boy would have ever dreamed of.

title: Read My Lips
description:
Maisie's deaf, she understands what everyone is saying to her by reading their lips. But, high school wasn't easy for her. Been the new girl is always tough, but when you're deaf it's worse. That one group of 'popular' thought it'd be funny to bully her for both reasons, she's new and she's deaf so how will she know what they're saying?

Then there's Zach. He has his group of friends; they're the 'bad boys' of the year. Everyone's scared of them. So when one day, he sees what these 'popular' people are doing to Maisie, he feels the need to protect her, but Zach, along with the rest of his friends are un-aware that Maisie's deaf. 

So how will they react to finding out that she's deaf? And what happens when someone from Zach's life pops up unexpectedly?

authorBio:
Hello! My name's Katie and I'm a teenager.

Slight bit of info here;
I'm from the North of England therefore I am most likely to use slag in my stories unknowingly... and I'm sure people won't know what I mean. But for example, if I write 'cooking tea' I don't mean the drink... it means dinner but in the North of England we call dinner, tea. :)

When I was younger, I used to write all the time, but then it was all about princesses, haha. I love to read too... It's probably my most favourite thing to do.

I love watching movies (especially ones with Zac Efron ;)), History's my favourite subject... I've just finished sixth form, and I'm now studying at university  I love listening to music- it's like my escape. My favourite colour's blue. Also, I'm really socially awkward, ha ha.

Music: 5SOS // The 1975 // All Time Low // twenty one pilots // Halsey // Taylor Swift... and more.
Favourite books; Private Peaceful // The Infernal Devices... ok, I can't name a few I have too many.
Favourite TV shows; The Vampire Diaries // Pretty Little Liars // Gossip Girl // Teen Wolf.
Favourite movies; The Karate Kid (original) // The Sound of Music // Dirty Dancing // Divergent // The Perks of Being A Wallflower and more.

Although I joined Wattpad in 2012, I actually didn't start writing on it until around May 2013. I don't think i'm that good at writing but we'll see how it goes...

Um... I don't really know what to put in here, so, I guess I'll leave it at this.

READ MY LIPS IS SO BAD!!! I WROTE IT WHEN I WAS LIKE 14 AND I'M NOT PROUD OF IT. IT'S NOT THE BEST WRITTEN, NOR IS IT FACTUALLY CORRECT. PLEASE DON'T JUDGE MY OTHER WRITINGS BASED ON THAT ONE LMAO. TY!

title: Love House
description:
LOVE HOUSE

In a humble village nestled among rolling hills, a simple family struggles to make ends meet, with six children depending on their parents' unwavering love but unstable livelihood. Anaria, the eldest daughter, shoulders the weight of hope and ventures to the city, leaving behind the only life she's ever known to help her family.

Years later, amidst the bustling streets and towering buildings, Anaria finds more than just a job-she discovers love in Mateo Alvarez, a wealthy coffee shop owner with a heart as warm as his brews. Their bond grows, like two vines intertwining, bringing her joy she never thought possible.

One rainy evening, as they shared stories over a cup of coffee, Mateo surprised her with a simple yet heartfelt gesture-a hand-carved key to his shop, a symbol of trust and a shared dream. Anaria's heart swelled with gratitude and love, a stark contrast to the struggles she had faced before.

But life, like the seasons, has its twists and turns. Can love bridge the gap between two vastly different worlds and help Anaria bring light back to her family in the village?

LOVE HOUSE is a tale of sacrifice, resilience, and the unyielding power of love to transform lives.

title: They Met on the Night Train (bxb)
description:
Ben never expected to cry with a stranger on a late-night train, but heartbreak does strange things to people. The next morning, he wakes up beside someone who seems like the last person he'd ever click with - the "straight" football player.

Reeling from the fallout of a toxic relationship, Ben is struggling to find his footing-and his voice. As he dives into preparing for the provincial art competition, he's forced to confront the emotions he's spent years burying. Between navigating his ex's shadow and creating a piece that truly reflects who he is, Ben begins to realize that art is about more than just perfection-it's about honesty.

And then there's the new guy. His unexpected partner in art, whose easy laughter and unfiltered energy challenge Ben in ways he never imagined. As their worlds collide on the canvas and off, Ben has to decide if he's ready to risk opening his heart again-for himself, and maybe for someone new.

Honest, tender, and brimming with hope, this is a story about finding your own colours in a world that's too often black and white.

title: Kathy With A K's Song
description:
"Oh my darling, when you smile, it is like a song"
-
"Obviously," She started. There was a nervous shake in her voice that made me tilt my head in her hands. "Obviously you don't understand the agreement." She repeated after quickly composing herself. I rolled my eyes, but let her continue.

"Where you go, I go. Where I go, you go." She told me sternly. 

Her thumbs grazed my cheeks and heat rose on my skin where she touched.  

I couldn't tell if this was just Sophia being caring or if she was maybe feeling more. My brain told me that this was all a friendly gesture, but my body and it's stupid hormones were telling me that it was something more. And your brain can never really overcome true instincts.  

I moved closer towards her, shrinking the already limited space between us. This time it was Sophia's turn to blush which only made my smile grow larger. All I could think about was her lips meeting mine.

(a new and improved skmw xx)

title: Boys Are Liars
description:
How are you supposed to fall in love when teenage boys could care less about a relationship and more about getting in between your legs? 

You'd think she'd know from the first time that boys always lie. 

One sickening lie. 

A very dangerous game. 

When the guy Sariah Abara has been casually seeing breaks her heart the night of her seventeenth birthday party she is devastated. Sariah is left picking up the pieces of her shattered ego and wondering what went wrong. Then her life takes a drastic turn when she crosses paths with Nolan Burns who is wealthy, flawlessly perfect, and charming. But in pursuing him, friends and family become enemies and dark secrets burst through the surface. 

He stares at me, his lips pressed in a line. "Make a choice," 

I swallowed hard, my heart pounding, threatening to crack open my chest. "And if I dont?" 

"It's me or them Sariah,"

title: A Thousand Secrets (crimson harbor series book #1)
description:
BANKS~ On June 23rd in Crimson Harbor Washington, a dark gloomy town filled with unrequited secrets, I found my brother Theo, dead in his car in the middle of the woods. He had Thallium Sulfate in his system, and nothing will stop me and my three  friends from finding out why, even when people don't want the truth uncovered. I have just started on a gruesome path to revenge, until we found a girl with long black hair and even darker eyes, bloody and standing over a dead body. Rose Adeline graves a 19-year-old girl who attends Crimson Heights University fortunately where me and my friends attend, she works at a local diner, has no liking for anyone or anything, and is a murderer. But Rose doesn't kill just anyone; she kills people who deserved to be killed and is just what we need to figure out the truth, Roses thorns are sharp, but I've always like to bleed.

ROSE~ My life is hell has been hell, when I was six my dad and sister died in a house fire, my mother turned to drugs and I was left in that trailer with her while she beat me. I don't like people, talking, becoming friends and my social life was six feet under. People didn't like me in Crimson Harbor, I was weird or know as a bitch but one man just try's to walk into my life like he owns it, and I wont have it. I would kill Banks to get rid of him and his friends if I half to, but he's like a snake slithering under my skin and cracking all the metal and ice around my heart.
(BOOK NUMBER 1 IN THE CRIMSON HARBOR SERIES)

title: The Elites
description:
❝Mysterious," he hummed in amusement. "I like it. Are you new then, mystery girl?❞

-

High school is like a game of chess. You have to gamble the moves you make and risk the chance of checkmate. In Harrington, that isn't the case. No matter what moves someone could make  -  unless you were one of the Elites - you'll always face checkmate, just for pure pleasure and entertainment, because that's all they'll ever be; another pawn in their game.

But that was before Candace.

After her best friend was ripped away from Harrington due to her obsession with climbing the hierarchy, Candace knows that she has to do the same to them. One by one.

And once she does, she'll finally rest. 

But what if destroying the Elites means destroying someone she cares deeply about too?

title: Unspoken Scars
description:
Some scars are visible; others run deeper, hidden beneath silence and fear.

This is the story of a young woman navigating a world of fractured relationships, unspoken rules, and the weight of expectations. With nothing but her will to survive, she leaves behind the only life she's ever known in search of freedom and self-discovery.

As the past threatens to pull her back, she must confront painful truths, redefine love and trust, and decide what it truly means to move forward.

Unspoken Scars is a raw and reflective journey of resilience, survival, and finding light in the darkest of places
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Welcome to my corner of Wattpad.

This isn't just a story... it's my personal journal, a way to put my life into words and process everything I've been through. Unspoken Scars is a raw and honest reflection of the moments that shaped me. The pain, the growth, and the resilience it took to keep going.

I'm sharing this not just for me, but for anyone who has ever felt lost, silenced, or misunderstood. If you're here, maybe you'll find a piece of yourself in these pages too.

Feel free to follow along, leave a comment, or add my story to your reading list. Every reader means more than I can put into words.

Thank you for stopping by and giving my story a chance.

I'll be adding New Parts Weekly ❤️

title: Just "Friends"
description:
I felt Peter come up behind me and wrap his arms around my waist, then he slowly began trailing his lips down my neck, I was starting to become weak at the knees, then I snapped out of the trance it was putting me in just before before slipping out of his reach as quickly as possible.  

"Are you crazy!! I don't want your parents to walk in on us."  I exclaim, feeling my cheeks start to blush.  

"Will you relax, they left two hours ago and won't be back until Friday, my dad's on a business trip."  Peter says with a big smirk as he laces his fingers through mine

"Oh, right."  I say with a slight chuckle.

With that Peter closed his door, and he pushed me onto the bed and began kissing me passionately, and the kisses trailed from my lips to my neck and before they could go any further, Peter stopped and looked at me with those beautiful brown eyes of his, and just smiled at me, as he ran the back of his hand along my face.

"I love you Paisley."  Peter says with a warm smile on his face.

"I love you too."  I say feeling nothing but pure joy as the words role off my tongue.

And with that the moment was killed.  We were after all only in high school, seniors for only 3 more days, but still only in high school, I sat up on the bed and Peter just sat there for a few moments.  He looked at me for what seemed like a long time but was really only a few seconds, as he slowly went to get up off the bed, he planted a kiss on my forehead and with that my conscience had a choice.  Either let the moment die or try to save it.  I was going to try to save it.

I grabbed Peter by his shirt and pulled him back on top of me as we fell onto the bed all over again and this time, there was not stopping, there was kissing and the whole 9 yards. Until I laid there in his bed, the sheets covering every last inch of me up out of embarrassment.  Peter and I just laid there looking into each other's eyes.

This kept replaying in my head during the cab ride home from the airport.

title: 𝐃𝐮𝐟𝐟𝐲 𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚂𝚗𝚘𝚋𝚜 𝚂𝚕𝚊𝚢𝚎𝚛
description:
The thing about being a DUFF is, you don't always know you're one until someone points it out-like a big, awkward elephant in a room full of tiny, graceful gazelles. The acronym stands for "Designated Ugly Fat Friend," but if you've been crowned a DUFF, you probably already knew that.

And if you didn't... well, congrats-ignorance really is bliss.

Harper Grant didn't exactly volunteer for the title of DUFF, but then again, no one does. It's not like she woke up one day and thought, "Hey, I'd love to be the poster child for 'not pretty enough to date but funny enough to keep around.'"

But high school has a twisted way of assigning roles you never auditioned for. One minute, you're just Harper-quiet, a bit out of the school norm, minding your own business-and the next, you're 'Harper the Whale,' the girl people avoid like the flu because they're afraid your unpopularity is contagious.

For Harper, being the DUFF of Glendale High wasn't about being hideous or repelling people with bad hygiene. She had a cute face, thank you very much, and she could work a pair of jeans like nobody's business. No, her DUFF status was all about perception : Carly Chase's perception to be exact. 

One snide comment from the queen bee, and suddenly, Harper's slightly curvy body and quiet demeanor were grounds for social exile. And because high school social rules are about as logical as trying to solve a Rubik's Cube blindfolded, no one wanted to risk befriending the 'whale.'

So, there Harper was : the designated outsider in a sea of perfectly coiffed and curated teens, doomed to be the unremarkable backdrop to everyone else's homecoming selfies. But if there's one thing no one warned her about being a DUFF, it's this : sometimes, being on the outside gives you the clearest view of what's really going on inside. And Harper? She was about to do a lot more than just watch.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: For My Eyes ONLY
description:
"No," I whispered in pure disbelief, "You can't be Ashton, that can't be." My voice cracked making me feel weaker in his eyes.

I stared at the man in front of me, 
waves of shock lighting through my body. 
This wasn't Ashton. 
I always knew there were two sides to him. 
Everyday I watched him desperately fight to keep this side of him from taking over.

Scar.
The name rung over and over and over again in my head, piercing my ears, making my insides scream out.

"Say it!" he yelled slamming my body up against the wall behind me, my head hitting the wall more force then the rest my body, causing me to let out a pathetic cry.

"Please Ashton, no  you can't do this I have a family-" I yelled back, a tear sliding down my cheek.

He cut me off with a dark laugh, his stone cold expression glued to my frightened one.

"This is your family now, 
Moore Blood Mafia, 
welcome my sweet Amaretto."

title: I Can't Believe The Bad Boy is Tutoring Me
description:
Tori Anderson is the typical shy, nerdy seventeen year old.  After her parents died, she's been living in a foster home with her foster mom and the other foster kids. Tori's had dyslexia for as long as she can remember and she hates it more than anything. She likes to keep her mouth shut and stay in the background. That's how she likes it; nothing more, nothing less.

Connor Evans is a hot-tempered, care-free, reckless, eighteen year old bad boy. He couldn't care less about the people around him or what they think about him. He gets along with life by smoking, drinking, and partying. But one thing he is not so proud about is that he's one of the smartest kids in the senior class. I mean, how could a reckless bad boy like him get good grades? 

But Tori's dyslexia becomes a problem, and she's told that she can't graduate until she gets her grades up. What other choice did she have? She had to be tutored by the horrible Connor Evans...let's see where this goes.

title: His Little Princess | completed
description:
Bad boys: people view them as unfit fathers. Why? Well, their bad boy lifestyle of course.

That's where Asher Cain comes in. Throughout his whole high school life, he was that mysterious bad boy player. Drugs, underage drinking, sleeping around.. That's what he got into.

And then we have the innocent one: Juliet Harp. Juliet falls for his charm and ends up falling into bed with him too. It wasn't like a high school fling, it was more of a I've-just-got-out-of-a-relationship and I-want-to-have-a-one-night-stand sort of fling. That's essentially what it was, fresh out of high school and fresh out of a relationship. Juliet found herself in bed with Asher and then, a few months down the line, finds herself pregnant with his baby.

They weren't ever really friends, just acquaintances.

title: Letters To The Moon
description:
As Dakota Akihara crashes, Rhea Walton falters. 

         While one is drug away from a life in the 1%, the other finds it increasingly-unbearable to put up with the crushingly-expected and dependable monotony of slow business, bills to pay, and mouths to feed. 

          Rhea Walton knows herself well enough. Well, enough to understand that very few in her small, small town, particularly not her father, see who she is below her mask. 
         Dakota Akihara - now Dakota Maxfield - on the other hand, feels as though presently, his entire identity is a question mark. Wether he's being over-dramatic or not, is not the point.  His father's in jail for embezzlement and insider trading, his family is striped of everything, and his mother has forced him and his sister, Aya to leave their lives in the Upper East Side. Ironically, her search of refuge ends in a place with people she hoped never to interact with again-who don't, quite frankly-know anything about her life after she left. 

       So of course, on a full moon, Dakota Maxfield faints in front of the Walton's diner window.

title: To See Me as You Do
description:
"What do you call a fish wearing a bowtie?" 

Instantly, Sawyer frowns, an unimpressed expression on his face. 

I continue to smile at him, urging him to ask as I grab his shoulders and shake him, "C'mon, Sawyer, you gotta ask!! What do you call a fish wearing a bowtie??"

He shakes his head, turning away from me as he presses his tongue to inside of his mouth. Flatly, he states, rubbing his face, "We're not doing this shit, Mari."

"Yes we are!!!" I snort loudly as he scowls at me. Poking his shoulder, I ask, "You ready?!!"

"No."

"I'm gonna say it."

"No, you're not-"

"SoFISHticated." 

"You're a fucking idiot."

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

*Lengthy Chapters!!*

(Also!!! Currently adding in some chapters to fill in a plot hole I noticed!! May take some time!!)

Marianne Parker and Sawyer Cortez are complete opposites of each other. 

Marianne believes in finding the good in everything around her. Always smiling, laughing, kind to everyone, and definitely an optimist. With a bubbly attitude and an outgoing personality, she's always looking to make a new friend, and all around a ray of sunshine. 

Sawyer, on the other hand, is blunt, rude, and pessimistic. He doesn't believe there could be good in everything. He doesn't smile, doesn't laugh, isn't interested in making new friends or socializing. Hell, he BARELY tolerates his own friends. The total definition of a raincloud. 

But, when Sawyer meets Marianne, it becomes all too clear that there's something about her he can't ignore. From the way she walks, talks, laughs, and smiles. It's all distracting to him, and he doesn't like that. In his efforts, he tries to ignore it and avoid her. But that can be hard when the girl in question, AKA Marianne, is EQUALLY interested in him too.

title: Love Punched | COMPLETED
description:
❝ I'm as much a bad-boy as you're an average girl. So I suppose that answers both our questions. ❞

•♤•

Lila Smith's life was a perfect routine. Until the house next door became the devil's residence.

•♤•

Lila was average. 

Or so she claimed. With a stash of hidden insults she had no problem throwing at the bad-boy Derek Greyson next door, Lila ignored him. And all her plans to remain undiscovered go to hell when she sees him at one of her fights at Blue. 
Sadly for her, Derek's intent on finding out who the so-called Wildcat of Ladenhill is.

Derek was a badboy.

He wouldn't have paid her any attention but to him, Lila was a mystery he wasn't okay with. The average girl soon became his favorite person to annoy and his target of perverted jokes. With secrets he wanted to share, Lila becomes his escape. But if he's anything, its persistent. And he wants to know who the fighter behind the purple Wildcat mask is and in the end uncovering far more than he bargained for.

So he became the Wolf of Ladenhill but the Wildcat's anything but easy.

And considering they're both magnets for danger, it doesn't take long before intertwined trouble gives the two a revisit from their pasts.

  "Move or I'll put soap in your eyes." I warned, as Ocean continued to block every step of mine.
  
  "You're the one who's in MY way... YOU move." He commanded with a hint of amusement in his voice.
  
  "If you don't move I'll nipple cripple you..." I threatened making him bring his arms up to cover his chest.
  
  "Why would you want to violate mine when I always take good care of yo-" I slapped my hand over his face before the word left his mouth. 
  ----
    A pack surrounded by tall walls. No one could come in, no one could get out. 
    An Alpha notorious for using guns instead of claws. Why? No one knows. 
  
  Since Naya first met Ocean, she knew he's been hiding something from her. What? She was dying to find out. After all, she was an Alpha herself. It was uncommon for two Alpha's to imprint on each other. But, nothing about Ocean and Naya was normal. They had extraordinary secrets and with extraordinary responsibilities. 
  
  But they must figure out their purpose quickly, before time runs out. 
  
  Before someone else much more powerful catches up to them. Someone who's been around for centuries.

title: The BadBoy screams trouble!
description:
"S-sorry!" I struggled to release myself from the ropes I was tied with. Carter laughed as he bought the disgusting lizard close to my face. 

"Front or back guys?" He asked his friends. 

What does he means by front or back!? God! No! What is he going to do? Oh god!

"Front!" They replied. 

"Yeah, that will be fun!" He said as he pulled the fabric of my shirt from the front and left the lizard inside. 

"Aaaaaaahh!No!!God! I won't do this again! I promise! I ssswear! I won't do this again! Please don't do thisssssss!" I could feel the thing moving inside my bra. "Carter! Pleeeease! Don't do this! Ahhhhhhhh! Heellllppppp!" I cried, I puked, I struggled and moved like worm but they just watched the show from the far. And Carter, well he was videotaping the whole thing. 

Now:

I didn't realise I had tears in my eyes by now. "Im really sorry Sparkle...." I heard him say as he wiped a tear from my face. 

"I can never forgive you. Ever!" I shook my head.

He used to be my crush, now he's my nightmare.

********************

Long story short:
We knew each other since forever.
We became best friends, but then he turned against me.
He promised me a living hell and this last years he hadn't waste any chance to put me down.
That's Brett Ryder and I, Alyson White, am totally screwed.

********************

My knees shook and a yelp scaped my lips when his fist collided with the locker beside us. But no body steped in, instead, everyone seemed to find my fear extremly amusing. Everyone but Brett who held a harsh unreadable expression as he glared me down. I barely could manage to held his gaze with my tearly one, but I knew better than to dismissed him this time. My eyes widened when he inched closer, not knowing what to expect and about to freak out. I stopped breathing.
"Fuck you and your silent treatment."
And just like that he spun around and stormed away, not before punching the locker again so hard that it dented. I was left there, shaking and sobbing, embracing myself and wondering when had things turned so wrong between us. 
He wasn't my friend anymore.
But not only that: Brett hate me. 
And he had no remorse in use his force to prove it.



********************
// Currently editing, I apologize beforehand for the errors you'll find in it //
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Art Of Love and Light
description:
Paris Adler and Sydney Blake have been college classmates for a while. Paris is captivated by Sydney's beauty and talent in fashion, while Sydney is drawn to Paris's gentle nature, photography and poetic skills. Their story is one of budding romance intertwined with the complexities of personal growth, academic pressure, future plans and even friendship. Despite potential obstacles and challenges, they are determined to overcome difficulties and fight for their love.

The Art Of Love and Light is a fan fiction that is inspired by many American teen romantic comedy and romantic drama movies (like "The Kissing Booth", "Tall Girl" "Hello, Goodbye and Everything In Between", "Chemical Hearts", "Turtles All The Way Down", etc.) when it comes on different aspects.

title: A Vagabond's Tale [COMPLETED]
description:
"This story is WOW!!! How I wished it didn't come to an end!" - chysungal

"Did you kidnap me?" he asked. 
Gigi's eyes widened and she shook her head furiously. "No!" 
"How did I get here?" he asked, his tone was strong but beads of sweat covered his forehead. 
His eyes flashed at her. "I heard stealing is common occurrence for you people." 
Gigi clenched her fists, as heat raced to her cheeks. 
"We don't-"
"I heard tales that you once stole a nobleman's daughter." 
Her blush deepened down to her collar bone. 
"We don't capture people. And Lady Brixton left on her own accord." 
The sailor's gaze remained accusatory. 
"Do you know who I am?" he demanded. 


Growing up as an Eldin vagabond, Gigi has lived her life on the outskirts of cities and been regarded as the scum of society, dreaming of a better life she never imagines will be hers.

When she saves a young man from drowning and receives news of her uncle's death, these two events send the life she knows on a different course.

title: You BETcha
description:
Max Turner is the high school's star quarterback, making him very popular. When Max's rival, Xander catches him cheating he blackmails him into a bet: date the most unpopular girl at school for the rest of the school year or else he will tell the principal that Max has been cheating. Both of which will ruin his reputation. But he chooses the first option and will have to date Sally McDonaldson.

Sally McDonaldson is a nerdy theater girl. She is an outcast at the high school and gets bullied a lot. But when the star quarterback, her biggest crush since freshman, asks her out she feels wanted for the first time ever. She thinks it is an official relationship. Little did she know it was all a bet in the first place.

As Max gets to know Sally the more time he hangs out with her, he discovers there is more to her than what meets the eye. Sally discovers under all of Max's ego, there is vulnerability. 
_____________________________________________


"Xander, please don't tell anyone," I pleaded.

"Now, I won't tell that you cheated under one condition," Xander said as his lips turned into a cunning smile.

"Ok anything!" I said.

"You have to date the most unpopular girl at school for the rest school year."

_____________________________________________

**Warning: this book contains abuse, toxic characters, and some swearing**

I made a new cover!

authorBio:
Hi guys! What's up!

I'm an elementary teacher for 18 years already. Before I don't have any idea what is wattpad but I know that it is one of the well known hobbies of most people. One day, I saw one of student reading some certain story in her cellphone. Out of curiousity I ask her what is she reading and she told me that it's a story written in an online app called wattpad. Then she taught me how to download it and how to find some interesting stories there. title: Nothing to lose
description:
My best friend Greyson McNamara and I have been partners in crime for a while now. Pranks, sneaking out to go to parties, joy riding in our parents' cars, all that crazy teen stuff, we made a pact to do together. And surprise surprise, dating each other was never on that list. I mean it's not like Grey is a bad looking guy or anything. Wink wink.

Now back to that no dating thing. For years, we heard about how we would be a cute couple and how we are perfect for each other. Of course, we always laughed it off until one day we didn't.

Our senior year has ended with two back to back breakups and all we can think is that we have nothing to lose. That includes us thinking that it can't hurt to try to date each other for the summer before college. We made a promise to each other that we'll stay friends no matter what. 

Like I said we have nothing to lose. But what if I'm wrong?

title: Star Gazers [BXB] [COMPLETED]
description:
*Spinoff/Sequel of Lab Partners (Recommended you read Lab Partners first but not required.)*

"You know, you shouldn't smoke those things," I spoke softly, referring to the cigarette perched between his teeth. The pale light of the moon made his skin glow like an ethereal light, while his black hair shone like pure obsidian. 

"And why not?" he asked tiredly, letting the poisonous smoke escape his lips as he looked up at the stars. 

"They'll kill you," I said honestly, finally looking away from him to peer up at the brilliant night sky. 

He took the opportunity to turn his stunningly blue gaze back to me. He studied me lazily for a few minutes before asking, "And what if I want to die?"

I looked down, straight into his eyes, and asked, "What if I don't want you to?"


*This is a bxb book. If you don't like it, don't read it. There is also a trigger warning.*

I write captivating LGBTQIA+ stories that span a wide variety of genres. Whether you're craving a bittersweet romance, a supernatural adventure, or a dive into historical fantasy, my books weave beautiful imagery with darker, thought-provoking themes.

Lab Partners became a published novel in 2020, and you can still unlock the digital versions here on Wattpad or order a physical copy from your local bookstore or favorite online retailer.

I love connecting with readers, so feel free to reach out if you want writing advice or just want to chat! I'm a bit of a mystery, but I might drop fun bits of my lore if you stick around.

Follow me for stories that linger long after the last page.

title: Love Letters Unanswered
description:
In the bustling corridors of academics and career ambitions, "Love Letters Unanswered" delicately weaves a tale of unrequited love between Saanvi Sharma and Ritwik Khanna, two brilliant minds destined for success. Saanvi, with her heart firmly set on Ritwik, navigates the challenges of adolescence and adulthood alongside him, all while keeping her feelings a closely guarded secret.

As they progress from school to university and eventually into the competitive world of corporate life, Saanvi finds herself drawn deeper into Ritwik's world. Their shared academic excellence and professional journeys only serve to intensify her affection, yet Ritwik remains oblivious to her unspoken yearnings.

Through poignant narratives and heartfelt moments, the story explores Saanvi's emotional evolution-her hopes, dreams, and the quiet struggles of loving someone who sees her only as a friend and colleague. Each chapter unfolds with the tender ache of missed opportunities and the poignant beauty of unspoken words.

"Love Letters Unanswered" is not just a tale of one-sided love but a reflection on the complexities of human emotions, the resilience of the heart, and the enduring power of love that lingers in silence. It is a story that resonates with anyone who has ever loved silently, hoping against hope for their feelings to be noticed and reciprocated.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Embers of Unyielding Love | 3 Wishes Series #3
description:
3 Wishes Series #3


In a world that can be both cruel and unjust, finding someone to lean on and a true soulmate is a rarity. Gillah was fortunate to discover this connection, a stroke of luck that seemed destined until a single argument altered the course of their relationship, transforming them from allies to enemies. 


Despite the treasured moments they once shared, a deep animosity now stands between them, seeming insurmountable. This self-made enmity has sparked a conflict so intense that it appears no one can quench the flames that now engulf their bond.

title: Thirteen Summers
description:
After she suffers a great loss, life takes Josephine St. Claire on a captivating journey of self discovery, when she is reunited with a family that was hidden from her. 

A plethora of siblings but a close-knit family nevertheless, one that she was purposely made an outsider from by her mother, Josephine wonders if she will ever fit in or if she's simply destined to forever walk the lonely road.

title: Razor Sharp | ✓
description:
Ellie Cartwright never had a normal upbringing.
That's what happens when your father is Damon Cartwright, leader of The Skulls. You don't get the privilege of a normal life. 

Ellie has always wanted to stay under the radar, escaping the reputation that her family uphold. But every day she has to face the notorious rival gang; The Razors. She has to enter their territory, watching her back at every turn.

When a job for The Skulls goes south, Ellie learns that she may not know her family at all.

Kidnapped and in danger, she must face her true enemies, even as she grows closer to golden-boy, Hunter Haswell. Her hatred for the notorious son of The Razors has always remained strong, but as the days drag on, the ability to separate her beliefs from her feelings begin to blur.

Betrayal, lies, heartbreak. 

For Ellie, only one thing truly matters; who do you trust when you are surrounded by enemies?

© 2019 Madzalalor
Completed on 03/06/19

title: OH MY, SSG PRESIDENT
description:
Story Description:
Oh My, SSG President follows the journey of Mik Mik, a simple and hardworking student whose life takes unexpected twists and turns after meeting Gabriel, the charismatic and mysterious SSG President of their school. Set in a high school environment filled with competition, friendships, romance, and drama, Mik Mik navigates through the challenges of personal growth, complicated relationships, and self-discovery.

From being bullied and dealing with jealousy from Gabriel's girlfriend, Shiela, to forging new friendships with Drake and Alex, Mik Mik's world becomes a whirlwind of emotions. The story explores the struggles of unspoken feelings, broken trust, and the pursuit of dreams. As Mik Mik shines in academic and extracurricular achievements, she learns to balance her ambitions with her heart's desires.

With the school year marked by exciting events like the JS Prom, Foundation Day, and various competitions, Mik Mik's resilience and determination inspire those around her. However, lingering tensions between Gabriel, Shiela, and Drake lead to unforeseen conflicts, testing Mik Mik's strength and capacity to forgive.

Amidst the laughter, tears, and heartbreak, Oh My, SSG President is a story of young love, loyalty, and finding one's place in the chaos of high school life. Will Mik Mik and Gabriel's paths cross again, or will new beginnings take her in a different direction?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: EMPRYEAN: A TALE OF FALLEN SOULS.
description:
"In a city consumed by darkness, where temptation lurks in every shadow, lies are currency, and betrayal is a game, a young, naive village girl is thrust into the viper's den.

Having lost her mother, she's forced to leave behind the only home she's ever known, and move to the city to live with a father she barely remembers. Her Christian upbringing and innocent heart are no match for the wickedness that awaits her.

As she navigates the treacherous halls of her new school, she's drawn to not one, but two boys who will change her life forever.

Slavvy, the school's resident bad boy, with a heart of stone and a deadly secret that could destroy them all. His touch ignites a fire within her, but his darkness threatens to consume her.

Haze, the charming and mysterious newcomer, with piercing eyes that see right through her. His presence awakens a desire she's never felt before, but his true intentions remain shrouded in mystery.

Torn between two boys, two worlds, and two versions of herself, she must navigate the deadly temptation that surrounds her. Will she succumb to the darkness, or will she find a way to overcome it?

Dive into a world of toxic love, dark obsession, and the blurred lines between good and evil. Where the price of temptation is sin, and the cost of love is deadly."
Domaine public

title: The Terminus-Under the sea
description:
It was 2050, the year of the misery.The world War 3 happened, a nuclear war which ended up making the earth inhabited. But luckily there were survivors. There was an organization called 'Octagon Veranda' situated on a lonely Island which was covered by a special Nano cover which was supposed to last 300 years and it's a shield against radiation, bioweapons and chemical attacks. This organization of scientists was created to survive the World War, which could've wiped out humans from Earth.  The communication system within the island was advanced and had no connection with outside to prevent AI attacks. It was protected in each possible way which is why humanity still lasts. It is 2201 now. Our little island is the only place humanity can survive on the earth but sadly it's a small island. The population is rising. So now we have a lot more problems to survive than radiation.  There are two parts of the island. Inside and outside. Simply heaven and hell on the same island. If you can get inside you are more than lucky. If you get to live outside, you better pray for death. Inside the island is the place where the Octagon Veranda, the main buildings and the city are situated. Octagon Veranda, we work on eight sectors that help humanity to survive. Each sector has a chancellor, and together that's the Octagon council.
Edward Sallow - Nano technology sector
Kane Johnson   - Chemical sector	
Kirstein Evens  -  Mechanicals and communication sector.
Jessy Terco       - Environmental science, Biology and human studies sector
Elsa Blake          -Medical sector.
Bell Bostic          - Security, exploration and social work sector
Penny Browns     - Hydrology and Farming Sector
Jupiter Terco        -Astro sector
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Skylar Emberlyn and the Rise of The Phoenix
description:
A young girl, living a normal life until she isn't. Until the only thing she knows is death and destruction. Until she's done fearing what lies ahead and instead is ready to face it, to embrace the fire within. 
She's living in a world of mortals, but belongs elsewhere. Her past still lingers, haunting her. They say a hero will kill the one he loves to save the world, and a villain will destroy the world to save the one he loves. But she's different. A hero and a villain both lie in her, equally strong. Equally capable of accomplishing different feats. That's what makes her different. She can save the world and the one she loves... At her own cost.

title: Ruin Our Friendship For Love
description:
Charlotte has spent years loving Joy in silence, her heart breaking a little more every time she watches her best friend fall for the wrong person. But when Joy starts flirting with the school's notorious heartbreaker, Charlotte knows she can't stay silent anymore-even if it means ruining everything between them.  

Tamara, the mysterious goth new girl, has her own demons to face, but something about Charlotte's desperate determination pulls her in. Tamara has no intention of getting involved-until she sees the pain in Charlotte's eyes and feels an urge to protect her she doesn't quite understand.  

In a world of stolen glances, unspoken truths, and broken hearts, the lines between love and friendship blur. As secrets are revealed and emotions run high, Charlotte, Joy, and Tamara are forced to confront what they truly want-and what they're willing to risk for it.  

Three lives. One tangled web of love. How far would you go to follow your heart?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio: Just a girl who's getting to know herself

title: As Time Reconciles
description:
Seven deadly magics, seven deadly hearts. Wrath, Gluttony, Greed, Sloth, Envy, Lust. But where did Pride go?

****

Book #2 of the Nichols descendants Series

****

As far as the heiresses could remember, Noelle fled to England for hiding in almost eight months ago. Nobody outside in the family knew where she ran, not even the closest friends could.

Not even Layla, the role model of Wrath. Giselle, the best example of Greed. Emelia, the locket of Lust. Kiki, the glass of Sloth. Miki, the heart of Envy. And Rheya, the addiction of Gluttony. Not even one of them could use their darkness on trying to make Noelle, the hand of Pride, speak to them again.

When Rheya was stitched back to the family, it was Pride's turn to run away. Noelle had never been seen walking around the Philippines ever since the Armstrongs were after her life.

 Yet for Timmy Martinez, what were the unspoken words he wanted to say to Noelle before she left?

One person...

One Martinez...

The heir of one of the Nichols' greatest rivals would change it all...

In a world of elite lifestyles, everything happens unsuspectedly. Even in the slightest things, they would end up badly.

Timmy became a burden once it was told that Noelle was out of sight without a trace. He did everything; even if it meant killing fifteen families would be possible for Noelle to come back. He would do it.

Even if he tried to find her for eight months straight; Timmy couldn't even place the pieces back in their junction.

What would happen if she steps foot back on the soil of the Philippines not only to take responsibility for her own disappearing but to reconcile with the others?

Who's ruling the world in this era of Noelle?

Love?

Remorse?

Contribution?

Or the Deadliest Sins roled by the girls whom people identified them as the most innocents in the cruelty of the world?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: The Rockmore House
description:
*A sequel to The Palmer Pool* 

Vanessa Brooks, now a high-school senior, hopes to put her time-traveling days behind her, until an opportunity arises to return the favor of a fellow time-traveler stuck in the past.

******

As Vanessa Brooks begins her senior year of high school, she hopes that the routine of life as usual will distract her from her memories of Pete, the boy she fell for and left behind in 1953. Now painfully aware of the risks of traveling to the past, she considers her time-traveling days over, even though she still longs to reunite with Pete. 

But with Eric Anderson, the only person who knows the truth about where Vanessa disappeared to all summer, keeping an uncomfortably close watch on her, along with her suspicious family and friends, she knows the only place she'll ever see Pete again is in her vivid dreams.

When Vanessa accidentally travels from a 1920s themed Halloween party at a local historic mansion to an eerily similar party in the actual 1920s, she reconnects with a fellow time-traveler who needs her help. Vanessa discovers her ability to affect time is even stronger than she thought, and so is her determination to fight for what- and who- she wants.

Cover by @JELyrica

Content Warning: this story contains alcohol and drug use, and references to near-drowning events, panic attacks and drug overdose.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: A Pucking Mistake
description:
Roxanne Hartley, a top-tier figure skater, has always kept her focus on winning. But when she enters a no-strings-attached fling with Elliot "Blaze" Carter, a hotshot hockey player, things quickly spiral out of control. What was meant to be a casual distraction turns into a fiery, unpredictable connection neither can ignore. With emotions running high and boundaries blurring, Roxanne sticks to one rule:

Keep it simple, no complications. 

But when she finds out she's pregnant, everything changes. As jealousy and possessiveness take hold, Roxanne is torn between her career, her heart, and the man who may be more than she ever expected. In this high-stakes romance, both must confront their deepest fears and desires.

This is no fairy tale. This is a Pucking Mistake.

title: The Bad Boy, The Sat Nav and Me
description:
"You're the good little church girl, this sort of thing shouldn't have happened!" Hunter exclaimed and I scoffed. "Please, you're the badass gang member, you shouldn't have got us lost!" I retorted, only to be rewarded with a scowl. "I'm a gang leader, not a navigator!" 

Being the girlfriend of Sheffield's toughest gang leader isn't all it's cracked up to be. With a break from University and after hours of convincing Hunter to sit back and relax, Andy decides it's time for a holiday. Staying in an Italian villa and working as lifeguards to pay off the room seems like the perfect getaway. That is until their night of freedom takes a wrong turning. Lost in Italy without their money and essentials, the couple are lost, homesick and a tiny bit aggravated. But where you have Hunter and Andy, you also have hours worth of arguments, bets and accidental detours. Not to mention the oh-so helpful advice from their dance troop and friends. Forget fighting as a member of a gang, getting back to their villa in one piece is going to be their biggest challenge yet.

Badboy Isn't my Type spin off.  Bad Boy Isn't My Type doesn't have to be read, this is also a stand alone novel.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello there,

These things always seem a bit pointless to me and that tiny bit upsetting. I mean, in all seriousness, are you going to read this and be like 'wow, that right there has changed my life!' No, I didn't think so, either. But then, if you did read this and decide that I've provoked some sort of spiritual journey or life changing experience, then you're very welcome...

Any-who, I could write pretty much anything in here, such as: I like raisins! Which, of course, I don't, but if I did put it in here, would you know about it and tell me that you like raisins, too? Who knows, you might, but I doubt it very much.

I think it's about time that I put something productive in here instead of some waffle about raisins. (I know, waffles, raisins, I seem food obsessed) As you're here, you probably want to know a little something about me. So, in honor of your visit, I've listed a few facts.

1. I'm 23.
2. I'm a Sims 4 serial killer, push doors that say pull and get hit by parked cars.
3. I sing occasionally, my shower thinks I'm fantastic.

As I'd feel cruel to do one and not all of them, I don't take reading/follow/shoutout/translation requests as I get too many. I will delete any messages containing the above. Very sorry!

So, drop this nutter (Nuts, more food!) a message and I'll get back to you when I can.

title: Crazy Desi Romance
description:
"I'm pregnant," she announced, and the table fell silent. "With his child," she said, pointing towards him, who was happily drinking his juice. Hearing this, he spit the juice onto her brother's expensive suit and started coughing.

"Wha-" she kicked him under the table with her sharp heels before he could say anything.

"We really love each other, Mother," she said nervously, while he looked at her as if she had grown two horns.

"How can you be pregnant?" he whispered near her ear anxiously.

"Shut up and act along,"

"You should have told me you were going to do this," he whispered as she looked at him guiltily and was about to apologize when he said, "I would have loved to get you pregnant." He smirked, now almost kissing her ear. "You know method acting."

"Be quiet, let me get us out of this problem," she gritted her teeth.

"Your problem, not mine."

"Whatever."

"Very well then," her grandfather said, bringing the attention on him. "Then you both shall get married."

"WHAT?"

🦋

𝗞𝘆𝗿𝗮 𝗔𝘄𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗵𝗶 a twenty-six-year-old on her way to become a cardiologist, the one who fixes others, has always been the person who spreads love despite her own heart having none. She has been broken by her own loved ones but never failed to cheer a heartbroken person. The universe never paid attention to her wishes, yet she never gave up on finding happiness. But what happens when her teenage crush reenters her life? Will he be able to end her sufferings, or will he increase them more?

𝗥𝘂𝗵𝗮𝗮𝗻 𝗠𝗲𝗵𝗿𝗮 has it all, at least according to him: a beautiful family, loving siblings, and girls running after him for his attention. He only wishes that everything remains the same as it is now, but will the universe fulfill this wish? Or will it bring a beautiful mess into his life, someone he never paid too much attention to?

❝Maybe it was purely by chance or perhaps it was always written in the stars❞

title: Little Mafia Boy (BoyxBoy) #1
description:
Mikhail is the son of a flower shop owner. He's hard working and sometimes a little too serious for his own good. He has a few good friends he socializes with, but that's about it. He helps his father run the flower shop after his mother died. They're both trying to keep the business open no matter what. Though, his father is a bit of a handful and a drunk so he often gets into debt with the wrong people. 

 Mikhail is one day met by Nico, the son of a powerful Mafia boss. Nico demands payment for his father's debt but Mikhail brushes him aside. For Nico, that was the first time someone wasn't afraid of him. This chance encounter leaves Nico breathless and in a need to see Mikhail again. The problem is that Mikhail doesn't want anything to do with Nico.

With a new group, 'Zechna', killing off Mafia members one by in the background, will Nico survive unscathed? Friendships will be tested, family will be damaged, and love will falter.  

Whether these two meeting will be a blessing or a curse is still unknown. They differ in personalities but, hey, opposites attract, right?

title: Season Of love
description:
Season of Love" is a heartwarming and engaging story that follows the life of Anike Martins, a beautiful and charming young woman. The story begins with Anike's reflections on her past experiences with love, including her disastrous dates with Olamide and Furquan.

As Anike navigates her daily life, she meets Adrien, a handsome and charming young man who falls for her. Despite Zoey's attempts to sabotage their relationship, Anike and Adrien grow closer, sharing romantic moments and getting to know each other.

Meanwhile, Chris, a kind and gentle young man, enters the scene, providing a supportive and calming presence in Anike's life. As Anike spends more time with Chris, she begins to develop feelings for him, creating a love triangle that adds complexity to the story, despite all these sweet things she has to undergo lot of bad themes and actions that occurs during love including lies , manipulation and betrayal and dealing with false accusations and web of deceit. 

Throughout the narrative, Anike's relationships with her family and friends are woven in, providing a rich and nuanced portrayal of her life. The story explores themes of love, friendship, and self-discovery, making it a relatable and engaging read for teens.

Overall, "Season of Love" is a sweet and captivating story that will leave readers rooting for Anike and her loved ones. With its lighthearted tone and focus on emotional growth, this story is perfect for teens looking for a romantic and uplifting read.

title: I was there
description:
Her eyes seem to be possessed with something, as the sun's rays reflect off the glassy surface, ashamed to be in her presence. Inside, stars revolve deep inside the vast galaxy she has managed to create, and as I trudge deeper into the depths of unknown, time and reality seem to pause and bow before her. A tinge of rose-inflicted water swirls in her eyes and blurs my vision, but her aura is somehow sweet. Like candy, her addictive smile lure all who see her, and her layered personality is timid, shy, and delicate. But don't be fooled, once she warms up, she is chirpy, and cheerful.
What does that description make you think of? An angel in a mortal's soul? A mere dream? I grew up with her, and she was the equivalent of something that even heaven couldn't conjure. But life is a deceiving creature. A lie. Because whilst her body portrays a perfect, shameless, care-free girl, her soul is slowly dying.
When I realized that she'd be enrolling at Yuko High, my blood levels spiked. However, it turns out that the girl I thought I knew was long gone. People change, and nothing stays the same. And in that time, I've changed a bit myself.
One thing I do know is that she isn't happy.

But I happen to have just the solution for that...

description:
Senior year has finally started for the quiet, yet sassy Cillian Bodhi; a teenage boy who loves his mischief and parties. So he thinks, anyways. title: The Start Of Chaos (Book One)
description:
A painful love is like a cup of coffee that's brewed too strong. At first sip, it jolts your senses, the bitterness cutting through. Yet, you keep drinking, because hidden in the bitterness is warmth, a comfort you can't seem to let go of. It lingers on your tongue, leaving a taste that's hard to forget, no matter how much water you drink after. 

She hated how much she still longed for his voice, his touch-the way he made her feel whole, even as he broke her piece by piece.

She took another sip, each swallow heavy with the weight of memories she couldn't erase. Was it the coffee that burned her throat, or the sob she tried to choke back? Could she walk away from the warmth that had once felt like home, or was she destined to keep drinking from a cup that only left her emptier with every drop?

How do you let go of something that's already etched into your soul?

title: Every Cloud has a Silver Lining
description:
High School Sweethearts Series: Series Four.


Salomi Garcia is a scholar at an elite, prestigious school, carrying not only the weight of her family's expectations as the eldest and only daughter but also the responsibility of supporting her own financial needs, including her tuition fees. Driven by her dream of becoming a news anchor, she chose the HUMSS track despite the immense pressure to succeed and secure her family's future. Her life feels cold and confining, marked by rigid expectations and the constant grind of balancing studies with part-time jobs. This overwhelming pressure often leaves her feeling lost and trapped in a cycle of obligations, with little time to explore her true passions.

Everything shifts when she meets Maverick Escarra, a classmate who brings warmth and color into her monochrome world, offering her a glimpse of life beyond her burdens. With him, Salomi experiences moments of freedom and joy, a temporary escape from her reality. However, one day, she is forced back into the harsh truth that her connection with Maverick is fleeting, a mere daydream. Salomi realizes she cannot run from the responsibilities and sacrifices that dominate her life, feeling as if she's trapped in a nightmare. This awakening leaves her questioning whether she will ever truly break free from the life written for her and if she can forge her own path amidst the expectations that weigh her down.

title: Beat Of My Heart
description:
Holly Vickers didn't care about superstar Sebastian Jennings, she certainly never thought she'd ever meet him in person, either.  She was a normal seventeen year old girl in high school just looking for a fun night out to escape her hectic life and decided to go to a concert with her best friend. 

Little did she know her life would change the moment her eyes connected with worldwide superstar Sebastian Jennings-singer, actor and international heartthrob. 

Did Holly have what it took to make sure that Sebastian didn't rewrite the tune of her life to the beat of his heart?


***


We stared back at each other in a heat filled moment, and as I looked into his piercing green eyes I felt myself being lost in his stare. 

He licked his lips and leaned down towards my face, and I felt his breath fan across my cheeks as I saw him close his eyes, lips desperately close to my own. 

I was about to lean in and close my eyes as well until I heard a piercing scream run through the hallways.

"SEBASTIAN JENNINGS!"

title: I hate that I love you
description:
"What do you want?" I snap, slamming my locker shut. His casual smirk, messy dark hair, tan skin, strong arms, eerie storm-grey eyes... the list could go on of things I notice- that I shouldn't notice- about him.

"Oh, I want a lot of things." He inspects a speck of dirt on his arm. "I'm sure you've heard the news?" His eyes flicker back up to meet mine. Does he know? No. He can't.

So I roll my eyes. He can't know that I know, that I would do anything to be the first one he tells. "You'll have to be more specific." I mutter, trying to look casual as I inspect my nails. "Well, it involves a certain title of the swim team," He offers. I shrug. "So you got captain. That's cool. And what do I have to do with that?"

He narrows his eyes, trying to read my expression. Unfortunately for him, I have mastered the art of hiding my emotions. 

"This is what I wanted to talk to you about. During English," He fiddles with his sweater sleeve. "I recall you trying to talk to me," I frown.

"Well, I..." He swallows, seeming... nervous?

"I'm not doing too great... subject wise. And if I don't pick up my ass soon, I might be forced to quit." He rubbed the back of his neck, making his shirtsleeve slide up his arm to reveal a strong bicep. 

Not that I notice.

I narrow my eyes. "And what do I get back in return?" I cross my arms. I'm going to be late for the bus if we don't hurry. He studies my face. "Name your price." He mirrored my position. I sigh. Money... but I don't need it. Popularity... but I don't want it.

I meet his gaze steadily. He lifts his chin, the tiniest bit, but it doesn't intimidate me. I square my shoulders and stand up straight. He's only just taller than me. 

"Stop pretending to be perfect."

All rights reserved. Cover art by me :) but will probably be redone soon

title: DESTINED FOR YOU | TAEJENKOOK |
description:
DESTINED FOR YOU | TAEJENKOOK

"She's coming to Seoul in a week-on Sunday, to be exact-and she wants me to pick her up!" 

But then, out of nowhere, Jungkook's face turned pale. He becomes nervous.

Taehyung noticed him gulping and fidgeting with his fingers. 

"What's up?" Taehyung asked, feeling concerned. 

Jungkook's throat felt dry. "Hyung?" he said, his voice shaky as he looked at Taehyung, who was visibly worried. 

"But you're the one picking her up from the airport," Jungkook said, biting his lip, his eyes showing his nerves. Taehyung frowned, clearly confused. 

"Why's that?" he asked, genuinely puzzled. 

Jungkook gulped again, his hands getting more anxious. 

"Because I've got all these accounts online, and she'll probably check out my profile and figure out I'm a playboy," 

He paused and says "So... I sent her your pics and said I'm Taehyung." 





♪♪♪

title: A Mischievous Gutsy Girl.
description:
Note :

*This is not a love story.*

This story is a long story having many stories hidden in it which are interconnected. So, Do Not Expect Everything To Reveal Just After Few Chapters. 

Presenting :

A Mischievous Gutsy Girl ~ by Isha Rahul.

A 15 years old teenager; smart, gutsy, funny, fearless, a lot different from a normal Indian girl, bold to talk her mind out, too naughty to handle, too mature for her age but no one is aware of her true personality, not even her own family. She is an open book but no one has ever tried to read her ever since the time she came back to India after spending more than 10 years of her life in different countries all around the world all on her own. But why?

She is the youngest in her entire family, even amongst all of the family friends too with whom she has not even crossed paths with. But soon, she will.

She is going to meet broken hearts, people who lost their smiles, angry young men including her elder brother too, criminals in disguise, entangled relations, scars, pain and some changed people. Will she become a hope to them or just another scar?

Having a big family, she never faced her family or any family friends properly, will she be able to win their hearts or if she even cares to win anyone's heart?

I don't think so.

As I said she is different. Yeah! A whole lot different! Read and find out yourself. Trust me this is going to be fun to write and to read it too. ;)

title: GEMINI | BWAM
description:
I was fully expecting her to leave. And the fact I had risked the single most happiest moment of my life to utter something so selfish made me want to curse myself. She snaked her hands into my hair and moved her head back slightly. Those eyes. Those eyes that always made me lose my train of thought, and today was no different. 

"I love you too".

That was it. All it took. I was all hers and I knew in that moment there was nothing that would ever compare to this.

Nothing.

              · · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

𝓘𝓂𝒶𝓃𝒾 𝓜𝒶𝒾.
Raised by the ever strong, self made millionaire and single mother Babette Mai, Imani has learnt early on that you can only look out for yourself. She's the newcomer on St. Arington's volleyball team and the heartbeat of every game she plays. Nicknamed "Inferno" she holds a presence that commands the court and a sharp tongue to match. But beneath the composed surface lies the weight of her father's absence and the pressure to succeed at all costs. Volleyball isn't just a sport: it's her sanctuary, her purpose. Her world is carefully built, every detail planned out. But plans have a way of shattering, especially when someone starts slipping through the cracks of her walls.

𝓝𝑜𝓁𝒶𝓃 "𝓝𝒾𝓀𝒶𝑜" 𝓞𝓀𝒶𝒹𝒶.
Son of the revered Dr. Hiroshi and Aiko Okada. St. Arington's "It Boy" and star point guard with a tongue piercing, an alternating coloured streak in his hair, and a matching streak of rebellion stitched into his very being.  His talent is undeniable, his skill unmatched, and every move he makes carries the weight of expectations far larger than the game itself. Off the court, he's carrying the weight of expectations he never asked for and dreams his family refuses to understand. title: Midnight Falls
description:
When you're a seventeen-year-old girl with anxiety disorder and a gorgeous, popular girl that absolutely hates your guts for who-knows-what reason bullying you whenever she gets the chance, Anna Falls has no choice but to face reality....
her life sucks. 

But the little sparks of hope that build up her optimistic, bright soul convince her otherwise. She will always think of one thing and that there is hope in life. Maybe even a goal. It might not be visible now, but she knew that it became as clear as a bell when she ran into Luke Carter. Twice. In one day. Second time being literally into him.

                                                        --

"How about fifty-fifty?" I offer in ragged breaths.
"We could have just done this from the beginning," he replies, breathing heavily. We both chuckle.
I gaze into his green eyes. "Your eyes are really beautiful," I blurt out.
"I know," he smirks.
"Are you always that egotistic?" 
"It depends," he answers, pushing my hair behind my ear.
I smile at him. "You're welcome then."
"I never said thank you."
"And I said you're welcome. Are we done, Catherine Obvious?" 

                                                      --

title: Enigma: Malison Of The Void
description:
In the world of the cursed, everyone has darkness lurking inside themselves. As for her, it turned into a raging void.

Enigma Alinac, a first-year in a school of cursed mages, knows nothing of her curse nor what magic she manifests. Nonetheless, upon encountering Emally Yekaterina, she tried to consider it again, which that girl tried to avoid.

Witnessing oddities around her, she realized that there still seems to be more to her than she already knew. Emally seems to be a part of it.
