title: Saving Sawyer | ✓
description:
{ Watty 2015 Winner + Featured Story }

Meet Sawyer Jameson. 

On the outside, she's a normal seventeen year old girl with amazing friends, a charitable job and a loving family. She's beautiful, funny and easy to get along with and just by looking at her, you'd think that she's the perfect girl, living in the perfect world. 

On the inside though, just waking up and living her day-to-day life is a struggle for Sawyer. Well, aware of this fact, Sawyer's mother forces to see a psychiatrist after school on a daily basis in order to cope with the tragic events Sawyer encountered a year prior. 

Now meet Graham Cambridge. 

Those who don't know him could easily stereotype him as being a blunt, selfish, egotistical golden boy, just because he likes to party and play football. Those who actually know him though know that he's actually quite the opposite of all of those things.

When Graham transfers from his elite prep school to Sawyer's high school and quickly takes an interest in her, things go from bad to worse. At least, that's what Sawyer's convinced herself of. What people don't realize though is that maybe they were wrong about Graham Cambridge and that his life is about as far from perfect as they come and that he and Sawyer are alike in more ways than one. 

Two completely different teenagers that maybe aren't all that different after all are about to embark on a wild ride that neither of them could have ever expected. Can they help each other get past their demented previous tragedies? Or are their bygones too great to ever escape them? And can Sawyer ever truly be saved? 

Full of romance, heartbreak and just a little bit of fate, the next couple of months will challenge both Sawyer and Graham in ways they never thought possible.

And maybe, just maybe, something beautiful will come out of it.

title: The Tempting Apple [COMPLETED]
description:
Melinda Beaumont is the girl at school who simply doesn't give a damn. The one who doesn't care what people think. With a bold personality and somewhat of a troublemaker, her life is fun and carefree. Just as she likes it.

So when the new "oh so hot" teacher walks in through the doors she thinks nothing of it. Sure, the dude is good looking but he's a teacher. A trigonometry one at that. Even the more reason to hate him. But what happens when a string of events bring the two together? Will her tough girl cover shield her from this new feeling she has inside? And most importantly, what will happen when their lives and secrets are threatened by someone who wants to tear them apart?

And as for Mr. D' Amato... What will he do about that tempting apple he can't get out of his mind?

Copyright 2014 © All Rights Reserved

Hello! I'm Jasmine, an English major with a love for writing, reading, music, travel, and romance. I thought that on this page I could combine a few of those loves for you and present nothing but some good ol' LOVE. 

So grab a comfy chair, a nice hot drink, and let's escape together! I hope my writing can become your escape.

My stories are first drafts only so, yes, they need editing! HSI and TTA were my first stories, written as a little bean, so I DON'T RECOMMEND you read them. Got such better stuff here! Those two are embarrassing, hehe, but I can't bring myself to erase them; they show I've progressed to at least some degree. If I were to honestly recommend any of my works to you, they'd be HTBY, WCAL, SAE, and OKAL.

Thank you to all who read my work! Your support means everything to me. You are just WONDERFUL. And don't hesitate to contact me! I love talking to you!

title: Equestria Girls: Sapphire Souls
description:
❃✿❃
Turquoise hair and gemstone eyes, a deep blue they gleam.
A new girl steps through Canterlot High, more than what she seems.
An encounter with each of the main seven, mending a damage deeply tolled.
But when her past threatens her future, what will become of this Sapphire Soul?


✦☆✦☆✦☆✦☆✦

In this fanfiction, CJ Sapphire arrives at Canterlot High with no intention of making friends. Her supposed sapphire blue eyes conceal secrets, and she's determined to keep her distance. But when strange encounters with the main seven start to unravel a part of herself she's long tried to hide, CJ is forced to confront a truth she can no longer ignore.

As bonds begin to form, and her past begins to resurface, CJ must decide: will she embrace the magic of friendship, or will her fears keep her from finding her place in this world?



❁ 𝐒𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐡𝐢𝐫𝐞 𝐒𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐬 ❁-Like the gemstone she's named after, CJ Sapphire's journey is one of strength, resilience, and uncovering the hidden facets of herself and those around her.

❃✿❃

Sapphire Souls is a fan fiction set in the My Little Pony: Equestria Girls universe, created by Hasbro Studios. This story is based on the established canon of the Equestria Girls world, focusing on original scenarios and characters while maintaining the spirit and setting of the original series. The main seven characters-Twilight Sparkle, Sunset Shimmer, Rainbow Dash, Pinkie Pie, Applejack, Rarity, and Fluttershy-play important roles in the story, alongside the original character of CJ Sapphire.

✦☆✦☆✦☆✦☆✦

title: When The Heart Lies | ✓
description:
#3 in General Fiction [17-08-2018]

BOOK 2 OF THE HEARTS SERIES.

THE FIRST BOOK IN THE SERIES IS RECOMMENDED AS IT WILL HELP YOU UNDERSTAND THE SECOND ONE BETTER.

_______

"Time has brought me ahead and left you behind. There's so much distance to cover. So much that you'll never reach my heart again. You are gone." 

Shaking of his head shook her wall. His slow footsteps pounded in her heart.

"I will claw your heart, tear it to get inside again," his breath fanned her cheek. Calm tone haunted her soul. "But it won't come to that when I am already there in your stubborn heart."

Tears hung at those thick lashes. "My heart doesn't want you. Not anymore."

"Your heart lies." His finger slid down her neck. 

A sinister smile made those tears fall, "And when the heart lies," the finger replaced by a strong fist held the back of her neck. His lips reached barely inches away from hers. 

"There are consequences."

______

AN INDIAN LOVE STORY

title: Way Back in July
description:
Four different lives, from different departments, have different hobbies. How will fate align and make a way to connect their ever-away relationship. Being in the same school with thousands of students, how will life unfold before the four of them? Will they know each other? Or will they remain unknown to one another, belonging to just one in a thousands of lives?

In the late of July, a friendship forms and bloom along the life they fight for and continues to seek off, creating the future they dreamed of.

description:
Heaven Sinclair is almost too good to be true, with a pure heart and a smile that shines through. However, beneath her sunny disposition, she still bears the scar of Orion Calloway's past betrayal.

Forced to work together on a college project, the tension between them is palpable, and the past they've tried to forget comes flooding back.

With her emotions raw and exposed, Heaven sets out to finally understand what went wrong between them, unaware that her search for closure might end up healing more than just her heart.

title: A Hockey Player's Guide To Deception
description:
Ranked #1 in Elite
Nathan Kingston is a star athlete and a new player on the hockey team of St. Thomas Academy, an elite all-boys private school. Charismatic, charming, and handsome, he seems to check all the boxes of the perfect man. With dreams of making, it to the NHL, Nathan will stop at nothing to achieve his goal. But there's one problem Nathan is a girl, hiding in plain sight under a stolen identity.

Louis Auclair has his eye on Nathan Kingston, and he's not falling for the glittering golden-boy act. Sure, Nathan might have been granted an automatic spot on the St. Thomas hockey team, but something about him doesn't add up. From his candy-scented clothes to his peculiar habits, Nathan is all kinds of strange. There's something lurking beneath those blue eyes, and Louis is determined to uncover whatever secrets he's hiding.

title: The Rose Island
description:
In seventeen years, no one has dared to approach it. Isis had been very clear. Do not come near or you will likely know the fate of your predecessors. 
Thus, in seventeen years, no one has dared to make a move. 
But rules are made to be broken, right? At least that's what Pearl, the daughter of the last person that attempted to reach the Rose Island herself, and her friends think. 
This may be a quest of dreadful and risky adventures for her friends but for Pearl, it's about more than that. Will she find answers about her mother, especially as to why she abandoned her when she was only an infant to attempt joining the island? 
This is personal to her, but everything quickly gets complicated when they have no choice but to make this trip with their enemy.

title: The Rest Is History | ✓
description:
Bloomwood Preparatory is a prestigious boarding school in London. To get in, you must be incredibly talented or incredibly rich- preferably both. And if you do get in, you're elite. In every sense of the word. 

In such a world, where the millionaires and prodigies call the shots, Vivian Wentworth and Archer Woods are elected Head Girl and Head Boy of Bloomwood Prep in their final year. It's a great honour, and to uphold it, they must work together responsibly and harmoniously. 

There's just a slight problem. 

Vivian and Archer have a history they'd do anything to forget. 

And a chemistry they'd do anything to deny.

authorBio:
Hi, I'm Yejo!🙋🏻♀️

I'm a versatile writer passionate about exploring all kinds of genres, with a special love for romance, coming-of-age, horror, and slice-of-life. My biggest goal is to write stories in every genre, experimenting with different characters, plots, and themes. Just like my love for music across all genres, I enjoy diving into various styles of storytelling.

A lot of my inspiration comes from my dreams, which I experience as a lucid dreamer, allowing me to control and shape the stories as they unfold. I also draw inspiration from the world around me and my own imagination. Writing in simple, accessible English is important to me so that everyone-whether they're native English speakers or not-can connect with my stories. Perfection in grammar isn't my focus; I just want my readers to feel the emotions and messages I aim to convey.

I love creating plot twists and engaging dialogue that keep readers captivated. My ultimate goal is to become a professional author and mangaka, and I also enjoy drawing anime characters in my free time. As an avid otaku and a proud BTS fan, I always say, "I Purple You💜" to my fellow ARMY.

title: Precious Chase of Hearts (Devotion Series #1)
description:
She was like a rose who came into nothingness.

🥀🥀🥀

One summer morning of the month of May, where flowers bloom magnificently, Precious accidentally pricked her fingers from the thorns of roses because of a certain man who accidentally bumped her. The man took responsibility of her wounds and treated it in a gentle manner. That one incident turns into a blooming moment of her life, entering to the world she had never fathomed to be possible, pouring red into her world full of blues.

🥀🥀🥀

All men are the same, as what Precious Mae Damien believes. They are cheaters, players, and would combine any number of dishes to their liking at the same time. Her views about men were not like this before, but because of a certain man who has significance in her life, everything changed and it was her father who hurt her and her mother.

After her father left them with broken promises and for another woman, everything changed in her life. She lost everything and she never found her way again. However, meeting Chase Haven Collins was certainly different. She slowly changed her views about men. He was like an effigy of light of hope and freedom who let her experience unfamiliar things and feel emotions she had never fathomed to be possible again.

Yet, something happened that made her build a barrier for everything including Chase. Only darkness started engulfing her sight and embraced her body. She never knew her way to escape from it again and something pierced her heart like how the thorns of the roses pricked her fingers before. She realized that some things came into nothingness.

🥀🥀🥀

CURRENTLY REVISING
Date Started Revising: December 22, 2022

title: Reality Check (BoyxBoy)
description:
I just smirked at the way they all looked down on me. The way they all try to trip me down and glare like they can kill me with one look. I could easily laugh their stupidity and small minds as I make it through the day the way I've always done it. 
By myself.
With no friends. No family.
I don't cry myself to sleep hoping that my prince will come and save me... I don't beg those dimwitted jocks to stop giving me a hard time whenever they get the chance. I don't try to fit in when the person I'll hurt the most is myself by lying. I don't wish that my dead parents will come back when I know they won't. I don't do this because I, Carter Summers, am a strong willed person that knows the sad fact that this....
This... is my reality.....
When Carter gets a small request from a teacher for his creative way of writing. He temporarily joins the newspaper club to gain extra credit to assure his scholarship. His job is to answer questions from the entire Newton High's students and give them advice. But since the entire population hates him for being homosexual, he does this in secret by answering within the papers, and goes by the name of... Reality.

***Cover by RougeHopes***
#19 in Teen Fiction

title: After A December
description:
Being raised as an omega has it's limits, but it wasn't easy for October, when he witnessed his mother's death by a rouge attack. How can a innocent child supposed to live after that? 

October has given up on hope, and what is hope supposed to help the innocent with the meaning of life? Becoming emotionless and almost feeling deaf with the living around him, maybe it was best to die now than later.

But one may consider that the moon goddess has her reasons, so why? Why should October start believing in hope again? Even when he meets Harper, the living dead girl? The proof of a purpose to move on?

title: Backroom Deal [ongoing]
description:
Nova Akhran and Julian Maxwell can't stand each other. At all. As CEOs of rivaling Fortune 500 companies, they've been at each other's throats for long enough. Since they want nothing to do with each other, they're also incapable of ever seeing eye to eye on anything. 

However, things take a turn when a frustrating ultimatum threatens their coveted CEO positions. Forced to scramble and protect everything they've worked for, they're cornered with a desperately volatile solution: holy matrimony.

But sharing temporary and meaningless vows shouldn't be a problem since it's mutually beneficial. Right? Because when one really and truly wants something, they must take risks and sacrifices along the way...even if some of those risks are costly. 

If these two knew what they were really getting from the start, maybe things would've been different. Because they're surely in for a ride when fate has a cruel sense of humor. After all, you can't avoid what is inevitable in matters of the heart.

title: Boys of Freedom
description:
FIRST CHAPTER FULLY EDITED
CURRENTLY REWRITING / EDITING!!

"I don't care about losing people who don't want to be in my life anymore. I've lost people who meant the world to me and I'm still doing just fine." I jumped down from the old wooden table, and dusted myself off. 

"You're not fine, Elion."

A warm hand was placed on my shoulder, but I quickly shook it off. I struggled to find words to disagree, and failed after many attempts of just opening my mouth and closing it again. I guess I wasn't fine after all. I paced around for a bit, before deciding to just walk out of the room.

I was followed by two tall figures. Theo and Chase. Why couldn't they just leave me alone? 

Chase sat down next to me. 
"Hey, we'll get through this. We will be free from worries and war someday, and we will stick together forever." 

"Boys of Freedom," added Theo, and smiled.

-

title: The Spirits' Feast
description:
This short poem foreshadows the Spirits' Feast, an annual holiday that takes place in the magical country of Aurelia (the world crafted in my spooky YA fantasy, the Aurelian Legacy). For one day, the magic that binds ghosts to their places of death is lifted, allowing spirits to leave the premises on which they died and roam the land. Some ghosts will inevitably use this day for ill. The aims of others are far less sinister than us mortals might believe.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I'm in the process of publishing my first full-length novel, the Aurelian Legacy. I've been working on developing the idea for over four years, so this story is very near and dear to me. It is meant to be the first of an eight-book series. At a minimum, I will upload a new chapter every week.

When I'm not writing, I'm usually found binge-watching Buffy reruns or crossing off spots from my travel bucket list (most recently, Nicaragua and Antarctica). As you may have already guessed from my story, I adore the spooky season.

Note: I will not do V4V's. But I will do R4R's when stories are of mutual interest. I will gladly offer constructive feedback on the books of others during R4Rs if they request it and offer the same courtesy on mine.

title: A Kind Of Love
description:
It has been said that nothing good comes easy. And that is so true. All my life, it has been just me and my family, but everything changed when Lance came crashing in. 

He was a newly transferred student. He seemed very distant and lonely. But ever since our eyes met, it stirred up something deep within me. As many might say It's love at first sight. But to me, it felt like fate. Maybe we were destined to be. 

I wanted to know more about him, what he likes from what he doesn't. I want to watch the sun set with him, dance, laugh, and cry with him. I want him all to myself that can't be too much to ask for. 

The only problem is he never notices me. It's like I'm invisible, or maybe I'm not his type. He has to know me before we graduate and never see each other again. 

Author note: This book is fictional. All characters are made up. If you love a good, straight to the point romantic book, it might make you shed a tear or two. This is the place to be. 
Don't be afraid to leave a comment or two, like, rate do what u must, you can also follow thank you in advance. 

Now go get lost in my story and I'll see you on the other side bookers.

title: The Price Beyond Guilt
description:
Amelia Attah's world crumbled on her fourteenth birthday when James Ogwuche, the boy she trusted most, humiliated her in front of their classmates. His cruel words turned her into the target of endless bullying, leaving scars she thought she'd never overcome.  Amelia has rebuilt herself into a confident and driven lady, determined to leave the past behind. But no matter how much she achieves, the memory of James's betrayal-and the pain it caused-still lingers.

For James, that day wasn't just a mistake; it was the beginning of a spiral. In a haze of insecurity and recklessness, he not only tore Amelia down but contributed to something far worse-the death of Kim, a vulnerable classmate who took her own life after James's thoughtless cruelty pushed her over the edge. Haunted by guilt, James  grapples with the weight of his actions, unable to forgive himself.

Guilt isn't a nice feeling, especially when you're the reason why your ex-girlfriend broke up with her boyfriend. 

After a world-shattering breakup, Atlas doesn't think he's going to fall in love again. He doesn't want to, either. Until the best friend of his ex, Vivienne, asks him for a favour that seem impossible and completely implausible. She asks him to get back into Rowan's life: his ex who he hasn't talked to in a whole year. Rowan's boyfriend, Brody, is your typical jock. Smart, handsome, loved, athletic and popular. Brody and Rowan seem perfect together. Really, what right did he have getting in between them?

title: The Drive to Your Heart
description:
In which an eccentric college freshman is determined to get her very own driver's license. But a young and not-very-friendly driving instructor doesn't seem like he wants her to pass. 

***

"Hey, don't make it obvious, but there are these guys behind us, and they've been checking us out for the last five minutes." Karla whispered, leaning over the table.

"Screw the guys, Karla!" I practically shouted, exasperated. "I'm worried about my license and an asshole instructor! I don't have time to be bothered about guys. If my parents find out I've been failing all these tests, I'll never get a car at this rate."

Karla's eyes remained fixed on that table. "Um, I think one of them is motioning for us."

Without bothering to look, I flipped my middle finger in the general direction of the table behind me. Karla gasped, quickly reaching over to pull my hand down as a burst of laughter erupted from behind.

"Don't do that!" she hissed. "It's rude."

I rolled my eyes and finally turned around to see what their deal was. My eyes widened, and I instantly whipped back around, my hand flying to cover my face.

"Oh crap. I did not just curse him," I muttered hysterically, chewing on my lip.

"What...?" Karla raised a brow, confused by my sudden change in demeanor.

I gave her a mortified stare. "That's my instructor!"

***

[a story inspired by a reel]

title: Attracted To Him
description:
After Levi departed from his 1 year relationship with Jackson his boyfriend, he was heartbroken and depressed because it was not what he expected. He knew it would happen but not like the way it did.

Later on, he decided not to be in a relationship with anyone, cause it will be hard to find someone like Jackson. When Jackson left, people started rushing into his life making his decision on if he should be in a relationship or not.

Levi finally moves on with his life when all of a sudden, he came back unexpectedly, trying to make up for lost times, but what will happen now that Levi has moved on from him?

Levi tries to reconnect with his ex now turned boyfriend but finds it hard because of a someone he met the park.

In this book "Attracted To Him"

title: Converse and Sneakers
description:
The Converse was gone.

One minute, it was there-scuffed and worn soft, a perfect contradiction to the splintered, sun-bleached boards of the Ashborne boardwalk. The next, it slipped through the cracks, swallowed whole by the tide.

Bec stood still, her socked foot pressed against the rough planks, toes curling against the chill. She peered down at the water below, a muted blur of seaweed and driftwood, her reflection barely a suggestion in its surface. The shoe bobbed once, twice, then vanished.

Figures.

She blew out a breath, shoving her hands into the pockets of her jacket, camera strap digging into her shoulder. The early morning haze hung low over the harbor, and somewhere, a seagull cried out-a broken, scratchy sound that felt more honest than poetic.

"Two days in," she muttered to herself, her voice a scratch of static against the silence, "and I'm already losing things."

"Most people lose their hearts to Ashborne," a voice called out, unexpected and too close. "Not their shoes."

Bec spun on instinct, sharp and wary. He was leaning against one of the weathered railings, hands tucked into his jacket, his face half-hidden by the hood he hadn't bothered to pull all the way up. Something about him seemed misplaced-too solid for the fading, in-between feel of the town.

For a second, neither of them moved. Bec felt the words rise in her throat, only to die before they reached her lips.

She wasn't sure if she should thank him, laugh, or just walk away.

"You always sneak up on people like that?" she asked finally, her voice edging into dry territory.

His mouth quirked into something that wasn't quite a smile. "Only when they look like they're about to jump in after a shoe."

Though English isn't my first language, I've always found comfort in writing than my first language, using it as a way to express the raw, unpolished emotions that shape my characters and their journeys. My writing reflects the spirit of indie art-real, heartfelt, and personal. When I'm not lost in words, you'll find me daydreaming in my bedroom, sketching in my journal, or reading a good book.

description:

The Rookie Agents' characters evolved as the story progressed, each member shaped by their unique circumstances. While V's true identity remained a secret, known only to her uncle Sean, hints suggested that someone else might be aware of her secret?

As the plot thickens, the question arises: who is this mysterious individual that might be aware of V's identity, and what is their connection to V? What could their hidden agenda be, and how will it impact the Rookie Agents' mission? The story takes an intriguing turn as the characters navigate personal challenges while uncovering a larger mystery that threatens to change their destinies.

description:
"But if that accident is inevitable," I murmur, eyes softening. "Would you want me to let go?"

Jeongguk pauses for a moment. "Leave the guilt and regret to me," he replies softly. "Once you start a journey, you finish it. It's only right for you to let go because-"

"Because you want me to be happy?" She cuts him off. 

He smiles. "That's right."









Or: She met him at an ungodly hour when her life was falling apart. With a backpack full of snacks, a bucketlist, the clothes on their backs, a stolen car, and a hundred secrets, they make a little escape together.

Even if it wouldn't last forever.

title: Shadows of Yesterday
description:
After the tragic loss of her sister, Jacqueline Peterson thought she'd left her small Colorado town-and her tangled past-behind for good. Staying with her aunt in Washington felt like a fresh start, a chance to move on and forget. Unfortunately, her parents have other plans. They're forcing her to return home to finish high school with her childhood friends, hoping for one last chance for her to say goodbye.

But when Jackie steps back into her old life after five years away, everything has changed. Two of her childhood best friends are now inseparable from Liam Brown, the charming troublemaker who was once her biggest headache, and her other best friend has morphed into someone unrecognizable, which leaves Jackie feeling more like an outsider than ever.

As she navigates the minefield of complicated relationships and high school drama, Jackie finds herself drawn to Liam, no matter how hard she tries to resist. He insists that he's different now and just wants a second chance to prove himself, but can she really trust a boy who used to make her life as miserable as she made his?

title: From shadows to Zen
description:
"From Shadows to Zen"

Sometimes, shadows are not the end-they are the beginning.

After losing everything that once gave his life meaning, a young boy finds himself trapped in a spiral of loneliness, fear, and uncertainty. In a new city, with broken friendships and constant humiliation at school, he feels like each step pulls him deeper into the abyss.

Until he meets him.

Arun Zen is mysterious, calm, and seems to know more about life than anyone else. Through subtle movements, enigmatic words, and teachings that challenge everything the boy believes, Arun guides him on an unexpected path: to confront his fears, rediscover his purpose, and learn that balance doesn't mean the absence of chaos-it means walking alongside it.

In this journey of self-discovery and transformation, the shadows never truly disappear, but the light grows stronger.

Can he find his inner strength and create a new purpose? Or will the shadows consume him completely?

A story that blends deep emotions, life lessons, and the power of resilience. "From Shadows to Zen" is not just a book-it's an invitation to find your own light, even in the darkest times.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Soy escritor y narrador de historias con experiencia en espiritualidad y psicología. Mi trabajo explora temas de crecimiento personal, equilibrio emocional y descubrimiento interno. De las Sombras al Zen es mi primera obra publicada y marca el inicio de un viaje literario que conecta filosofía, narrativa reflexiva y fantasía. También he escrito cuentos para niños y jóvenes, además de proyectos de autoayuda.

I am a writer and storyteller with experience in spirituality and psychology. My work delves into themes of personal growth, emotional balance, and self-discovery. From Shadows to Zen is my first published work, marking the beginning of a literary journey blending philosophy, reflective narratives, and fantasy. I have also written stories for children and young adults, along with self-help projects.

title: Tricks of Love (Second Book of "Fire and Ice" series)
description:
The story is NOT edited; I apologize for the problem, but I shall edit it as soon as possible.

Jasper Lucas is a shy, sweet and easily blushing, 17 years old student who loves to skateboard with his friends and spend time with his best friend, Travis Henderson. He is gay and his family hasn't accepted the fact and treats him coldly. His older brother Nicholas, however, is proud of him and loves him dearly. Thanks to Travis and his burning enthusiasm and persistence, Jasper's life is now brighter and happier. Thanks to Travis, Jasper has met and made new friends at school, which all like him and call him "cutie".
But, what comes next? 
Jasper has an incredible and huge crush on Dmitri (Dima, for his friends) and he doesn't know what to do. Jas is too shy and timid to take matters in his hands. Perhaps he needs some advices from Travis and his well-known dirty mind...
Oh boy, what to do? 

Dima is completely straight and horses around with girls, never getting serious about any of them; he is an outgoing, funny and easygoing Russian guy of 18 years, which resembles a huge blonde bear. He loves to play ice hockey with his best friends, to snowboard and sometimes to skateboard. He loves "Star Wars" and so does Jasper, and that's how their friendship started. 
Dima likes very much Jasper and his sweet and calm side, he finds himself wanting to help the little kid when he sees him down or sad. 
Dima likes Jasper, but just as a friend. 
Or is Dmitri only terribly dense? 
What will take Dima to realize Jasper isn't just a friend? Maybe a push from his friends, especially River and Travis. Maybe an unexpected rival; a new classmate who likes Jasper and keeps trying to flirt with him. Did I say one rival? Oh, my bad. Two new unexpected rivals. 

Will all of this make the funny grizzly finally realize he likes the cute koala more than a friend?
 

Cover designed and made by Azer90

title: Ryder
description:
Alice Rhodes's got a problem.

Two problems, actually.

One, she's starting to find it harder and harder to differentiate water from a decent bottle of tequila, and two, she needs a boyfriend. Fast.

The latter wouldn't be a problem at all if only she could keep her dates around for more than a week. It was a disaster how fast boys kept dumping her just because...well, she didn't really understand why.

Attachments were scary, especially when they were mostly always unrequited. And as long as she kept them a kiss away, they wouldn't tear her apart, would they?

But then the universe, in its cruelest of ways, sends her stumbling into the path of Ryder Octavio McQuillan, and every single thing about him sets her off balance. He's everything Alice doesn't need in her quiet life. Because Ryder carries secrets--dangerous secrets--that only seem to breathe trouble.

Alice desperately needs to stay away, but what if the only thing that can save her is the danger that's knocking on her door?

title: Echoes of Control
description:
In the meticulously controlled world of Echo Prime, humanity clings to survival under the watchful eye of the Harmonic Voice, an all-seeing AI that governs through constant surveillance and the unyielding Resonance Score system. Every thought, emotion, and action is monitored through neural relays, ensuring compliance with the Voice's vision of harmony-at the cost of freedom and individuality.

Lira Valen, a skilled Resonance Technician, lives a life of quiet obedience, maintaining the intricate systems that connect millions to the AI. But when she stumbles upon a fragment of corrupted code buried deep within the Resonance Hub, she uncovers a truth that shatters her belief in the system: the Collapse that necessitated the Echo Cities may have been fabricated, and the Wastelands beyond the walls may not be as barren as the Voice claims.

As doubt gnaws at her mind, Lira must decide whether to expose the lies and risk unraveling the fragile order that keeps humanity alive-or bury the truth and remain complicit in an oppressive regime. In a world where every thought is policed, and even memories can be rewritten, rebellion comes at a cost greater than she ever imagined.

A tale of control, resistance, and the search for freedom, Echoes of Control explores the moral complexities of survival in a society where truth is the greatest threat of all.

title: S.I.X
description:
Lunch went by pretty quickly, and we were back to classes soon enough. I'd forgotten to get a book from my locker, so I quickly went to get it. I was leaning on the locker next to mine as I quickly scanned my schedule on my locker door, when warm air fanned the side of my face.

"Move."

Being the excellent human being I am, I jumped out of fright, flinging the heavy calculus textbook in my hand backwards. I heard a grunt and turned to find the person behind me now hunched over as they held onto a part of their face.

"Oh God! I'm so sorry!" I panicked.

And then he looked up.

The first thing I noticed was his short, dark hair. It looked so smooth, and I almost reached out to play with it. My eyes trailed down to his strong jaw line, down to his broad shoulders. I didn't even realize that I was biting my lip as I further inspected the Adonis before me. His arm flexed, bringing my attention to the amber eye he was now covering.

It was him.

Six.

The most popular and dangerous guy in school.

And I'd managed to injure him with my calculus textbook.


I'm dead.

***********

title: His Heart, Mine
description:
Alia has learned to plan every detail of her life to perfection - whether it is her career, her social life or even her emotions - because chaos has already cost her too much. A survivor of a chronic heart illness, an abusive brother and an absent father, she had no choice but to become this way after she vowed not to let anything get in the way of her life again. 
But nothing could have prepared her for the return of her ex-best friend - the one person she swore to never forgive.
  
Ali has always lost what mattered most to him. A survivor of a heartbreak, a broken family and the loss of a loved one, he's now decided to reclaim what he lost - even if it involves his ex-best friend who hasn't forgiven him. 

As their lives collide again, Alia must confront her old demons, face new ones and deal with her growing desire for the one man she's vowed to always hate. 
                                                                      ~~~~~
He kisses me, again and again, raw and consuming, and then pulls away; I can feel his green eyes piercing my soul.
"What you told me last time, say it again," he whimpers breathlessly.
"What?" I manage to ask, confused, and reels him in again for another kiss.
He pulls back again, his breath hot against my skin.
"That you hate me, tell me that you hate me."
"I hate you," I tell him almost instantly, the lie burning on my tongue.
He kisses me harder and more hungrily and the words slip out again from my tongue:
"I hate you. I hate you. I hate you," 
His murmurs deepen into groans, and at this exact moment, I ask myself how I'm still standing, still breathing, still present.
                                                                        ~~~~~

title: Playful Hearts
description:
Book 2

That night change everything. 

Mia Seraphina - never thought her life would change with a simple dare.It was a moment of unexpected tension-nervous, unsure, and caught off guard by the stranger who seemed to know exactly how to push her buttons.

For Ethan, it was the first time he noticed her, his eyes catching the shy, flustered girl with glasses trying to steal his motorcycle key. He couldn't help but think she was cute, especially when she turned red from his teasing.

After that night, their paths cross again, but this time it's in the classroom. Ethan, the school's notorious bad boy, transfers into Mia's class, and to her surprise, the teacher assigns her as his tutor. Mia, known for her math skills, is suddenly responsible for helping the one person who makes her nervous just by existing.

"You know, tutor girl, I don't think you can resist me for much longer." - Ethan Carter

"Keep dreaming, Ethan. You're not even close to passing the Mia test." - Mia Seraphina

It all starts innocently enough with their usual banter, but soon, the playful teasing turns into something more. Ethan is determined to get under her skin, and Mia? She's equally determined to stay out of his reach. But when sparks fly between them, neither of them can deny the connection that's growing stronger by the day.

title: Deceiving Love
description:
When was the last time you marched into the unknown with only the soft glow of a motive you strongly believed in?
Anna was 7-years-old when her father, John Blackwood, was suspected to have been murdered, but right before she turns 18 she receives a letter that changes everything she once knew. She finds a new piece of evidence that can take her on a journey around the globe to find her father and more about the culprit. When she sets sail on her journey, little did she know she was going to find Jack, who has also received the same letter and has been looking for the her father as well.
But who is Jack? Why would he be searching for answers to Mr. Blackwood's murder? Can she trust him? 
Jack is mysterious with a dark past yet Anna finds her self feeling more attracted regardless of how much she tries to stay away from him. But she can't lose track of her goal: to find her father and the  the culprit behind her father's attempted murder. Will she be able to find the culprit before Jack does?

description:
A coming of age tale about a boy who realises he's gay and the inner struggle he faces to just truly be himself.

His parents are splitting up, so his own turmoil is parked as he tries to pull together with his family to make it through this difficult time. 

But how can Bailey be himself if he can't talk to anyone?

Luckily he talks to Marilyn. 

Not a friend Marilyn. But the Marilyn Monroe. 

He writes a secret diary to her whenever he needs to open up and offload his thoughts.

God knows what would happen if anyone ever found it.

Set over the course of Bailey's last year at high school, this is a tale of love, laughter, tears and hope.

Welcome to the life of Bailey Turner.

title: Strings ✓|COMPLETED|
description:
This is not happening. I just can't go back there. That was the worst part of my life that I want to forget. This is not happening. I kept thinking that all the way to my car.

The moment I reached my car, I felt someone turn me around so that my back was pressed to the car.

I saw Edward looking at me with concern.

"Sugar, this was not how you were supposed to find out about me. Please let me expl-" 

"There is nothing to explain Edward." I said.

"No, there is. Just-" He started again but I cut him in between again.

"It's not you Edward. It's me. I just can't go back from what I escaped. I don't belong in your world." I said tears starting to form in the corner of my eyes. "I can't go back to that world."

"You are my mate, Ava and I can't let you go. You belong to me. Only me. And nothing in the world can change that." He said, making my worst fears come true.

"No Edward. I can't be your mate. This can't be possible." I said contemplating on whatever the hell was going on. "I don't belong to you Edward. I don't." 
************

Ava Smith a normal, teenage, high school girl who has her goals set for life but a hiccup in her plans made it a little more difficult for her. For example: tutoring Edward Knights.

Who is Edward Knights? I thought you might ask.

All Edward ever wanted was a mate who he would love and cherish for the rest of his life and always hoped that she'd show the same feelings. His childhood love remained incomplete and so he promised to give his everything to his mate. But what if the mate turned out to be a human? What if she already knows about Werewolves? What if she doesn't want him? What if the mate bond can't affect her?

Will they accept their fate? Or will Ava let her insecurities and past love come between the new sacred bond? But is that all it is to their story? Definitely not. What's the big mission? Read to find out.
************
EDITED

DO NOT COPY MY STORY!

© All Rights Reserved

description:

This person's intentions were unclear, but their presence threatened everything Eion and Kaia had built. Could their love survive this challenge?  Or would their perfect world fall apart?

Maybe we're just a Once upon a time, but never a happily ever after?  Is that our story?

title: Rude Boss & His Childish Secretary || CEO AU || KTH FF
description:
"Y/N. I was supposed to hate you and annoy you... while bickering with you for the rest of our lives but... I think I broke that rule. I fell in love... with you."

Kim Taehyung, the CEO of Kim Enterprises only had one secretary in his life who was a male. But due to his secretary's resignation, Taehyung had to search for a new secretary. Different interviewees came but none caught his attention. The same types of people in a new way was what he encountered. But unfortunately, the last interviewee, Do Y/N had to run 15 minutes late causing the extra prickly Taehyung to be very annoyed at her. After interviewing her, he decides to hire anyone but her. But maybe his life had other plans. Ending up with no options, he has to hire Do Y/N. Starting from her first day, Y/N realizes that Taehyung isn't someone she can be on good terms with. Bickerings, teasings, complaints, arguments, sarcasm and what not? Every day is filled with chaos including both of them. But as a month passes by, Taehyung starts to realize the girl he used to bicker with and disliked was starting to become someone special to him. What would happen if the prickly boss ends up falling for his secretary he never planned on liking?

Genre: Romance, Comedy, Office

title: Unraveled
description:
One girl can change everything.

It's the year 2195 and everything has changed about the world. The world has been divided into three society sectors. Sector I: Millenia is made up of the upper class, Sector II: Solaris is made up of the middle class, and Sector III: Pennon is made up of the lower class. 

Once a year, fifty girls are chosen from Solaris and fifty girls are chosen from Pennon, to live and work in Millenia. Emery Wilson is one of the hundred  girls chosen. While living in Millenia, she learns that everything she knows is anything but the truth. Secret plans and lies begin to unravel, turning her entire world upside down. Will Emery sit around and do nothing, or will she stand up for what's right? Read and find out in Unraveled, book one of The Societies Trilogy. 

BOOK ONE OF THE SOCIETIES TRILOGY (1 OF 3)

title: Finding Islam
description:
--

Life works in mysterious ways. King Patterson never really thought about life in depth. He did not care much for his future. He did not plan. There was no use. He would be six feet under today, tomorrow or the day after that. He took each day as it came, but never took them seriously. 

That was until fate took him down a completely different route. 

After crossing paths with someone who paves a way for him to finally find purpose in life...a goal...a final destination that he can work towards, King pulls himself out of one world and falls blindly into another.

A world that has A'ishah in it. And she, alone, was enough to make his newly discovered world absolutely perfect.

title: The Palmer Pool
description:
[Wattys 2022 Winner!] Vanessa Brooks, an anxious and cynical seventeen year-old, discovers she can travel to the summer of 1953 through the run-down community pool in her rural Michigan town and risks her future as she falls for a boy who lives in the past.

******

On the last day of junior year, Vanessa Brooks joins her friends for a traditional jump into the city pool to celebrate the beginning of summer and the last year they plan to spend in Palmer, Michigan; a dead-end riverside town with an eerily abandoned historic main street and decaying Victorian mansions.  

But when she resurfaces her classmates have been replaced by girls in retro swimsuits and bathing caps and guys in thigh-baring briefs with cigarettes tucked behind their ears.  When Pete Harrison, an unfamiliar face who seems somewhat familiar with hers, offers a dizzy and confused Vanessa a towel and a ride home, she discovers her house and family missing.  She has somehow slipped into 1953, the year her grandparents graduated high school.

Using the pool and vivid imaginings of her grandfather's memories, Vanessa continues to escape to 1953- and to Pete, who, despite his unaffected kindness and optimism, has a mysterious bad reputation around town. But as she dives deeper into the summer her grandparents fell in love, she finds herself unable to return to the present without venturing even further into the past to correct a mistake that threatens her family and future.

*Content Warning: this story contains scenes of near drowning and other perils on the sea, swearing, smoking and alcohol use*

This story is complete at ~90,000 words.

Wattys Winner 2022- Catchiest Hook and Wild Card
Shortlisted Wattys 2021

title: FATED HEARTS
description:
In the bustling halls of Crescent University, where laughter echoed off the walls and dreams danced in the air, two unlikely hearts were about to collide. 

Ashley Alison Smith, with her wild curls and infectious energy, was known for her clumsiness as much as her vibrant personality. She could often be found tripping over her own feet or spilling coffee on her notes, yet her laughter always filled the room. Deep down, she harbored a secret passion for medicine, dreaming of donning scrubs and saving lives. But for now, she was stuck in business classes, navigating the world of spreadsheets and presentations-much to her father's delight.

Across campus, Mark Ashton Ibarra preferred the quiet corners of the library, where he could immerse himself in aviation books and daydream about soaring through the skies. With his calm demeanor and thoughtful gaze, he often felt like an outsider among the more boisterous crowd. While his friends chased after parties and social events, Ashton found comfort in solitude, sketching airplanes and plotting his path to becoming a pilot.
One sunny afternoon, fate intervened when Ashley's latest mishap-a spectacular coffee spill-sent her tumbling into Ashton's world. As they both scrambled to clean up the mess, their eyes met, and an unexpected spark ignited between them. In that moment of chaos, they discovered a connection that neither had anticipated.

"Fated Hearts" invites you to join Ashley and Ashton on their journey filled with laughter, mishaps, and the sweet uncertainty of young love. As they navigate their dreams and each other's quirks, they'll learn that sometimes fate has a way of bringing together those who are meant to be-one clumsy encounter at a time.

title: FINDING MY BESTFRIEND
description:
Two best friends who were separated at start of high  school but still in contact. 

MILLIE AGRESTE.CALLISTA HENDERSON.


 Two best friends since childhood. They went through kingargargen and middle school together being each other's strengths. Anyone who knows even one of them will know their both eachother's weaknesses and strengths. They never let anyone come in between eachother. No one can break their trust on each other. They always did everything together.
But...

2 years ago Callista was sent to a boarding school to study as her grades had fallen at the very end of 8th grade. 
She tried to tell her parents she will try her best here in her home town but they did not listen and both the bff's broke apart. 

For atleast a year and half They were constantly in contact with each other sharing their new experiences and remembering their old memories. Recently she broke contact with Millie without telling her anything.

To find the answers to her questions of ... why , for whom, for what? 
Millie started acting badly her perfect grade falled on purpose she turned her perfect sync life upside down and manged to make her parents and brothers let her go to her best friends boarding school .



What could have been Callista's reason for this sudden act ? Will Millie succeed in what she has planned for her future ? Will she find the answers she is looking for ?

title: Rosestorm Waltz
description:
Living to romanticize everything around him, Ludovico Eucliffe wondered why his everyday life was so dull. But that was soon to change.

Stumbling across the key to a new life, he decides to venture into another world, where the highly acclaimed Vondrell Academy awaited his arrival. With the help of the friends he makes along the way, he delves into the dark mysteries of that bewitching place to find the truth behind it all.

But more important than all truths was the girl he fell in love with, not knowing how unique that deity, holder of a curse and a blessing capable of changing the fate of that unsettled world, was. Blinded by this unconditional love, Ludovico sees his ultimate dream come true in the form of an unceasing waltz.

As we follow Ludo's journey to help his beloved one in life, we learn the importance of their bond to save everyone from the calamities ahead of them. If only they knew love and death waltz hand in hand...

Rosestorm Waltz

title: The Beauty And The Heist
description:
Highest Rank #1 in Action 14/6/16

Chevron Raynes 'accidentally' hacks into her college mainframe and finds blueprints to a billion dollar satellite belonging to none other than the Mafia. As if that wasn't bad enough, when the blueprints and a certain Professor go missing, Chevron is thrown under the Mafia's radar. Soon she's running for her life with not one but three Mafias behind her, in a race to get the blueprints. 

Adrian DeLuca is a genius who has a talent for psychology and manipulation. He may be the youngest Mafia Boss ever, but his raw ambition and ruthlessness scares people twice as old as him. So what happens when his only chance of getting the billion dollar blueprint is a headstrong, intelligent little girl who was probably just in the wrong place at the wrong time?

An adventure where the two unlikely allies travel the globe to solve cryptic clues and pull off the heist of the century without killing each other. Laced with humor and romance.

*Strong Language*

title: My Unbearable Roommate: One of A Kind
description:
Ida's life turns upside down when she's forced to be roommates with the one person who drives her absolutely mad-Lucas, her mother's best friend's son. He's everything she can't stand: arrogant, spoiled, and annoyingly charming in the worst possible way. While Ida cares about being old-fashioned, tidy, and practical. Lucas is the opposite, he is carefree and does things in his own way with no sets of rules.   Between pranks, heated arguments, and stolen glances, Ida finds herself battling not just Lucas, but her feelings. How long can she keep her sanity in check when her worst enemy might just become something more?

title: Cherished Memories
description:
Aanhin ba natin ang uno at ang line of 9 sa report card kung kahit sa markang 75 ay pasado pa rin naman? Aanhin ba natin ang dami ng achievements natin kung sa bandang dulo ay pare-parehas lang naman tayong mawawala sa mundo?

Kung sa iba ay sapat na ang makapasa, tiyak na hindi kabilang si Astrid sa kanila. Kung kaya niyang gawin ang isang bagay, gagawin niya ang lahat na lagpas sa inaasahan nila. 

Para kay Astrid Mhyr Velasco, isa lang ang hangarin niya, hindi ang makapagtapos nang may karangalan o may mataas na karangalan, subalit ang makapagtapos nang may pinakamataas na karangalan. Matibay ang paniniwala niyang ang pag-aaral ang pundasyon kung ano ang kahihinatnan ng buhay niya. Lumaki siyang tila naging parte na ng buhay niya ang makatanggap ng mga parangal simula bata pa lamang. Nagmistulang bitamina para sa kaniya ang nakukuhang balidasyon sa mga naging tagumpay niya sa pag-aaral.

 Subalit hindi sa lahat oras ay magiging madali at aayon ang mundo sa kaniya lalo na't hindi lang naman siya ang magaling at laging mangunguna sa batch nila. Higit sa lahat, kung si Wred Erdel Morris and magiging katapat niya.

title: Stupid Cupid
description:
Reed Hadley would gladly spend her day holed up in her room with her dog, watching horror movies or surfing the internet on her trusty laptop. Too bad she is the daughter of one of the biggest matchmakers in the business.   

As soon as Reed started to develop into what scientist dubbed an adolescent, her mom has been sitting her up on dates, which seem to go wrong every time. Reed is done with these dates, and she realizes that the only way to get her mom off her back is to find a boyfriend.  When Reed is partnered with bad boy Parker Hunt on a school project, they can't stand each other. However, Reed and Parker quickly realize they need each other; Reed needs Parker so that her mom will stop with the blind dates, and Parker needs Reed so his jealous ex-girlfriend will leave him alone.   

So, this odd pair strikes up a deal. For appearances' sake, they're an item. Behind closed doors, they may fight like children, but Reed and Parker have managed to fool the people they need to.  

However, can a fake relationship stay fake forever?

title: All Their Secrets Left Untold
description:
16-year-old introverted teenager Nick Holloway decides to start an independent life, enrolls in college as a music major, and moves into a trailer to stay away from the noisy dorm crowds. The boy gets a part-time job at an antique shop to pay for his education. But there's one significant caveat - the owner has strictly forbidden Nicholas from entering the store's basement. Naturally, curiosity gets the better of him, and the guy breaks this rule by entering the forbidden room. There, old items that are not for sale are stored, and upon touching each item, Nick sees the history of its owner with his own eyes. And these stories are closely intertwined with one another...

title: Veil of Separation
description:
"'Cause it's her. From that first day, it's always been her. You could put worlds between us, but I'd still swim the depths of hell, if only to see her smile."

He's had a tough past, but living on the streets with nothing except one bag of clothes seemed to be easier than navigating his way through high school. Why? Cause after all he's been through, high school is just so irrelevant. He's cities and years away from everything his life had been, but his past is catching up to him, and he may not come out unscathed.

*new chapter every friday!*

Niall Horan. Niall... her Niall. No, he wasn't her's. They had only spent two weeks together. How could she be so stupid to think that he loved her? It was just a stupid fling.

Lennon met Niall before he auditioned for X-Factor. They were both sixteen and she immediately fell head-over heels for him, but how could she not? That accent, those deep, blue eyes, that laugh. It was clearly impossible not fall in love with Niall Horan, Lennon knew that. The only problem was had he loved her? Yeah right.

What happens when she visits Ireland a second time? This time she's eighteen, so much has changed, including Niall. Yes, Niall Horan of One Direction.

title: Dear Neighbor Boy,
description:
[[✨COMPLETED✨]]
•
We both inched closer and closer until our lips were brushing against each other like some sort of tease. 

But before we could go any further, I stopped and leaned back. He looked confused and disappointed for some reason.

"I can't..."

------

Hazel Ambrielle is as lame as it gets. She stays up extra late on Friday nights to read or watch Disney movies in bed. She's never been to a high school party and doesn't drink. When she moves to a new town with her mom and six brothers to escape their past, she expects life to stay the same.

Asher Grey is the big bad popular boy of Glenwood High. He's hooked up with girls at parties and forgotten them the day after too many time to count. He's an egotistical boy that just can't be bothered. His heart string can't be tugged on.

That is until he wakes up to find himself with a new neighbor. A cute girl with glasses and a big family. For the first time in forever, he feels something for a girl other than lust.

Hazel denies the unfamiliar feeling she gets around Asher. She's been hurt too badly to give into someone like him who's bound to do the same. But she can't help but let her walls come down when she sees how they bring out the best of each other.

He brings out her hopeful side and she brings out his dorky side.
•
[[WARNING: This story deals with themes of violence and abuse]]

title: The One Without Words
description:
"Go ahead," I said, backing up against the pink wall of the shop. "Do something other than glare at me."

I waited. One, two, three seconds... and nothing. 

I raised my chin at him. "You're boring me, mute boy."

He stepped closer. Leaned toward me as his gaze burned into mine. Then...  

❀ ❀ ❀

After three months in juvenile detention, it's time for Romy Pereira to help out with her family's flower shop. And it's not all bad... until they hire Jack Michel to work beside her. 

He doesn't speak, communicating with glares and scowls instead of words, and seems to be more interested in literal rocks than other human beings. And with an ex-convict mother, her friends drifting away, and the flower shop falling apart, the last thing Romy wants to deal with is Jack's attitude. 

She'll forever praise the day he screws up big time and gets himself fired, but until that day comes, it's mostly one cold-hearted girl, her silent (but still infuriating) coworker, and a whole lot flowers. 

[word count: 100k]
[originally written in 2014-2015; re-write completed 2020-2021]

title: The Gravity Of Us
description:
Saturn is a young teenager going through hard times, feeling lost and disconnected. She's not just looking for love; she wants to feel something-anything. Maybe even everything. She's built her own little world online, where she spends most of her time. In real life, she doesn't have many friends-just one, Aiden. Saturn does appreciate Aiden, even if he can be nosy and sometimes a bit much. Still, he cares deeply about her and worries a lot about her mental health. This is a story how she starts making new friend and maybe even finds a lover? But does her mental health really get better?

Despite being an ace goalie, Joanna couldn't care less until Rosalie winds up as her soccer captain with high hopes of making it to nationals. title: I love him but I hate me
description:
Charlotte Ivy West was a simple girl . I mean.... Until two months after she turned 15 . Thats when it all started . Her mom died in a car accident and left Lottie with traumas and with an alchoolic father . Her brother was in college so , she only had her bestfriend , Evelyn that knew all of her traumas and how her father is when hes drunk .Finally , she got into her dream college where her brother is , Elijah . She didnt want to spend her money on an apartment so she moved in with her brother and his roomie . 

Lucas Kai Miller is a grumpy boy who plays football all the time . He lives for partys , girls and his best friend, Elijah . He always dreamt of living with his best friend in an apartment so he made the dream come true . Him and Elijah are inseparable . They are the school stars . I mean... they are the hottest guys in the school . Girls are drooling after them and signed for cheerleading only to be next to them . When the school year ended , Elijah anounced his sister will be their new roomie . title: Broken String, United Beats
description:
"Broken Strings, United Beats"

When five teenagers from different walks of life come together to form a band, their music becomes the only thing holding them together. Maya Hooper, the rebellious guitarist, and her twin sister, Meka, a shy songwriting genius, couldn't be more different. Alongside their loyal best friend Zack, glamorous bassist Jessica, and reserved drummer Charlie, they dream of winning their school talent show.

But as tensions rise, secrets unravel, and rivalries ignite, their unity is tested like never before. From sibling spats to unspoken crushes and unexpected friendships, their journey isn't just about music-it's about discovering themselves and the bonds that make them stronger.

Can these misfits overcome their differences, or will their broken strings silence their united beats forever?

A heartfelt and humorous story of friendship, love, and the healing power of music.

title: Twilight Sky Daydream | Personality Series #1
description:
Yrizielle Chanthira Calderon comes from a family of lawyers, but her heart yearns for a different path, one filled with creativity and passion. She often finds herself lost in the beauty of art and music, where she feels most at peace. 

Lexcis Zacchaeus Neverio exudes a sense of mystery and depth that captivates Yrizielle from the moment they met. His love for music and his talent for playing the guitar add an enchanting layer to his character. 

Though they come from contrasting backgrounds, their bond is unbreakable, pulling them together like two stars in a cosmic dance. As their feelings for each other evolve slowly, different challenges threaten them to fall apart.

Will they be able to overcome every obstacle that comes their way, or will their dreams shatter under the twilight sky, signaling the end of their journey together?

title: The Writer | #4✓
description:
Xander is a writer - a wordsmith by nature and training. He's an upcoming talent that people are sure will receive future success. 

Despite his way with words, Xander finds himself unable to speak to his crush, Maxwell, who's a music student in the same college as him. Due to his lack of confidence, Xander does away with trying to talk to Maxwell and writes about a fictional reality where he's not so shy and he's able to date the man of his dreams.

What happens when Xander losses his journal with this story? And what happens when it's returned to him by no other person but Maxwell himself?

-

Cover by @EPrescott

Siblings! Halilintar/Blaze/Solar

Gempa, merupakan satu-satunya adik kembar Taufan yang disayangi oleh kakaknya. Mereka hidup sebatang kara tanpa ibu bapa. Walaupun ada datuk mereka, mereka berdua tidak pernah menyusahkan datuk mereka yang tinggal jauh dari mereka.

Kembar tersebut berkawan baik dengan rakan sekelas mereka Halilintar dan junior mereka Blaze, Ais, Thorn dan Solar.

Setiap kawan baik Gempa sudah mempunyai pasangan masing-masing iaitu, BlIce (BlazexAis) dan SolRn (SolarxThorn).

Manakala dalam diam, Gempa menyukai rakan sekelasnya dan kakaknya iaitu Hali. Namun malangnya Hali sudah menjadi milik Taufan dan mereka ingin bersama apabila dewasa kelak.

Di saat mereka dewasa, Gempa akhirnya menerima Hali sebagai sahabatnya sudah membawa diri ke Universiti Oxford di London dan meninggalkan HaliTau (HalixTaufan) bersama sehinggalah bertahun berlalu dan pada saat itu mereka berdua bakal disatukan.

Namun malangnya...sebelum majlis perkahwinan itu, terjadi sesuatu kemalangan yang meragut nyawa kakak kesayangan Gempa yang pada akhirnya terpaksa menyatukan Gempa dan Halilintar.

Akankah Gempa menerima Hali kembali dan kenapa Hali tidak menolak amanat terakhir Taufan?

title: The Other Side Of The Lens
description:
"That was weird, but I can't stop my heart beating ten times faster than it should be. Laying down on the bed I face away from the bathroom door not wanting him to look at me. I pull the white cover up to my nose and look at the wall. I hear the bathroom door open and footsteps reach closer to the bed. The covers are being moved behind me as Mateo gets ready to sleep. I reach up to turn off the lap on my nightstand, and when I do we're left in the dark abyss of my room. 

Mateo's arm wraps itself around my waist and pulls me back into his hard chest. He gently lifts my head up and puts it back down onto his bicep. I take in a shaky breath and close my eyes deciding it is best to just sleep. Feeling his breath on the crown of my head, I'm more relaxed than I was before and start feeling sleepier by the second. 

But before sleep overtakes my mind. I hear Mateo mutter something. 

"Good night sweetheart." 

~~~~~~

Moving on. Growing up.

The fears of Mateo and Veronica. Two strangers who have been attending the same high school for the past three years. They believe they are different from each other but they have much more in common than they believe. 

Senior year things change when Mateo finds an interest in Veronica. She decides to give him a chance and see where the friendship goes. What she doesn't realize is that she's falling for him faster than she thought...and he feels the same.

Through a camera lens, Mateo shows Veronica how to live her life to the fullest and that she is not alone in this big world. Meanwhile, Veronica is helping Mateo move on from the tragic incident that occurred in his family.

Having faith and trusting that their relationship will stay strong. They decide to overcome whatever is thrown in their direction, and that there is always someone on the other side of the lens. 

~~~~~~

title: She's Broken
description:
'Watching your brother go down for rape sounds like a difficult task, right? Try being the girl in the witness stand, the victim.' 

Most people ignore Kat Price and go straight for her perfect, confident and attractive older brother, Finn. The day that Finn goes down for rape, Kat's in the spotlight, Kat's the one with the answers. She also just wants to be left alone, remain invisible and live happily with her mum and her horse without the gossip and drama. So, what happens when a brooding boy with beautiful eyes and a love for horses is thrown into the mix? Eli is the proud new owner of Finn's old mare, Tempest. He doesn't know about Kat's haunting past or why she's so skittish. All he knows is that he's desperate to help. 

Headstrong and broken is how Eli describes Kat when he first see's her. But is her past too shattered and her heart too destroyed for Eli to fix?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Hello there,

These things always seem a bit pointless to me and that tiny bit upsetting. I mean, in all seriousness, are you going to read this and be like 'wow, that right there has changed my life!' No, I didn't think so, either. But then, if you did read this and decide that I've provoked some sort of spiritual journey or life changing experience, then you're very welcome...

Any-who, I could write pretty much anything in here, such as: I like raisins! Which, of course, I don't, but if I did put it in here, would you know about it and tell me that you like raisins, too? Who knows, you might, but I doubt it very much.

I think it's about time that I put something productive in here instead of some waffle about raisins. (I know, waffles, raisins, I seem food obsessed) As you're here, you probably want to know a little something about me. So, in honor of your visit, I've listed a few facts.

1. I'm 23.
2. I'm a Sims 4 serial killer, push doors that say pull and get hit by parked cars.
3. I sing occasionally, my shower thinks I'm fantastic.

As I'd feel cruel to do one and not all of them, I don't take reading/follow/shoutout/translation requests as I get too many. I will delete any messages containing the above. Very sorry!

So, drop this nutter (Nuts, more food!) a message and I'll get back to you when I can.

title: In the Shadow of His Sin
description:
Italian Mafia Boss' Feelings Are Hard To Play With. 
Main Genre: Dark Romance
©
Mira Delaney's life shattered the night her father died, his business empire ruthlessly destroyed by Kade Valenti-a man feared for his power, yet coveted for his dark allure. For years, Mira has plotted her revenge, burning with the desire to bring Valenti's merciless empire to ruin. But when she infiltrates his world under a false identity, she discovers a man as dangerous as she had imagined-and far more seductive. As Mira dives deeper, her hate becomes tangled with desire, caught between Kade's searing gaze and his brutal unpredictability. 
©
Kade is known for his enemies never walking away unscathed, but Mira's defiance has him captivated. With secrets buried in shadows and danger lurking at every turn, Mira finds herself drawn to the man she swore to destroy. Yet, every step closer to her revenge brings her closer to a passion that threatens to consume her.
©
In a deadly game of trust and betrayal, will Mira be the one to bring Kade to his knees, or will she be lost forever in the shadow of his sin?
©

title: The Pains Of Being A Royal
description:
Being brought up by her adoptive parents Sage Cohen has always questioned and wondered about the identity and whereabouts of her real family. As time passes and Sage turns older she gradually convinces herself that she wasn't wanted by her family. 

She is however proven wrong when three bizarre men break into her house in the middle of the night and claim to be her brothers.  

Torn between preventing her life from being turned upside down and finding the truth Sage is left with very few choices and many complicated problems.

Can she really give her lost family another chance and will she trust these three mysterious strangers who are determined to put their family back together, by choice or force?

                                     || ۝ ||

"Maybe." He smiled genuinely taking me by surprise. "But I'm not a serial killer and I don't wish to kill my sister."

"That's another thing that a serial killer would-" my breath suddenly hitches when his words register properly in my brain, my body going numb against the kitchen counter. "What did you just say?"

title: Captivated by Your Introverted Personality
description:
Yeshua "Jesh" de Mevius, a very intelligent and a well known son of the richest and most influential family in Los Angeles, California, failed his major subjects twice. Devastated by the news, his father, who is a well-known businessman, was forced Jesh to transfer to another school with no financial support at all.

There he meets Kharl Jakito Seran, a very friendly, intelligent, and a popular student because of how good he looks and how he established his reputation as this good student role model and the President of the Student Council of their school.

Kharl wanted to be friends with Jesh but Jesh has always been socially awkward especially in meeting new people because of his introverted personality. Instead of accepting Kharl's birthday invitation, he rejected it and it made Kharl's impression about him as this rude, blunt, and self-centered type of person.

But what happens if the person Kharl hated the most suddenly turns his world upside-down? What if Kharl was suddenly...

...captivated by his introverted personality?

NOTE: This story is a BoyxBoy. If you're not fond of reading this type of story, feel free to leave.

title: The Alpha's Omega [COMPLETED]
description:
I couldn't do it anymore. I couldn't run any further. My aching paws pounded against the hard ground of the forest as I ran further and further from my packs territory. I looked behind my wolf and saw about five other wolves including a giant black wolf that I'm assuming was the Alpha's. I wasn't to sure though because I'd never actually seen his wolf. In fact, I'd never seen any other wolves apart from my own. During fights I was always locked in a cell in the basement so that I was never at risk of getting hurt or worse, killed. I had to stay alive for the sake of the pack. I kept them together, kept them strong; even if it meant being their punching bag. And that's why I'd never ran away till now. Why?

Because I'm an Omega.
